search_text: Benchmarking Safe Deep Reinforcement Learning in Aquatic Navigation 水生导航中安全深度强化学习的基准测试 We propose a novel benchmark environment for Safe Reinforcement Learning focusing on aquatic navigation. Aquatic navigation is an extremely challenging task due to the non-stationary environment and the uncertainties of the robotic platform, hence it is crucial to consider the safety aspect of the problem, by analyzing the behavior of the trained network to avoid dangerous situations (e.g., collisions). To this end, we consider a value-based and policy-gradient Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) and we propose a crossover-based strategy that combines gradient-based and gradient-free DRL to improve sample-efficiency. Moreover, we propose a verification strategy based on interval analysis that checks the behavior of the trained models over a set of desired properties. Our results show that the crossover-based training outperforms prior DRL approaches, while our verification allows us to quantify the number of configurations that violate the behaviors that are described by the properties. Crucially, this will serve as a benchmark for future research in this domain of applications. 我们提出了一个新的安全强化学习基准环境，重点关注水生导航。由于非静态环境和机器人平台的不确定性，水上导航是一项极具挑战性的任务，因此通过分析训练网络的行为以避免危险情况（例如碰撞）来考虑问题的安全方面至关重要。为此，我们考虑基于价值和策略梯度的深度强化学习（DRL），并提出一种基于交叉的策略，结合基于梯度和无梯度的 DRL 来提高样本效率。此外，我们提出了一种基于区间分析的验证策略，用于检查训练模型在一组所需属性上的行为。我们的结果表明，基于交叉的训练优于之前的 DRL 方法，而我们的验证使我们能够量化违反属性所描述的行为的配置数量。至关重要的是，这将成为该应用领域未来研究的基准。 本文提出一个用于安全深度强化学习的基准环境，专注于水下导航任务，结合交叉策略与验证方法提升安全性和样本效率。 Enrico Marchesini,Davide Corsi,Alessandro Farinelli cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.RO

title: Real-Time Optical Flow for Vehicular Perception with Low- and High-Resolution Event Cameras
title_zh: 使用低分辨率和高分辨率事件相机进行车辆感知的实时光流
abstract: Event cameras capture changes of illumination in the observed scene rather than accumulating light to create images. Thus, they allow for applications under high-speed motion and complex lighting conditions, where traditional framebased sensors show their limits with blur and over- or underexposed pixels. Thanks to these unique properties, they represent nowadays an highly attractive sensor for ITS-related applications. Event-based optical flow (EBOF) has been studied following the rise in popularity of these neuromorphic cameras. The recent arrival of high-definition neuromorphic sensors, however, challenges the existing approaches, because of the increased resolution of the events pixel array and a much higher throughput. As an answer to these points, we propose an optimized framework for computing optical flow in real-time with both low- and high-resolution event cameras. We formulate a novel dense representation for the sparse events flow, in the form of the "inverse exponential distance surface". It serves as an interim frame, designed for the use of proven, state-of-the-art frame-based optical flow computation methods. We evaluate our approach on both low- and high-resolution driving sequences, and show that it often achieves better results than the current state of the art, while also reaching higher frame rates, 250Hz at 346 x 260 pixels and 77Hz at 1280 x 720 pixels.
summary: Event cameras capture changes of illumination in the observed scene rather than accumulating light to create images. Thus, they allow for applications under high-speed motion and complex lighting conditions, where traditional framebased sensors show their limits with blur and over- or underexposed pixels. Thanks to these unique properties, they represent nowadays an highly attractive sensor for ITS-related applications. Event-based optical flow (EBOF) has been studied following the rise in popularity of these neuromorphic cameras. The recent arrival of high-definition neuromorphic sensors, however, challenges the existing approaches, because of the increased resolution of the events pixel array and a much higher throughput. As an answer to these points, we propose an optimized framework for computing optical flow in real-time with both low- and high-resolution event cameras. We formulate a novel dense representation for the sparse events flow, in the form of the "inverse exponential distance surface". It serves as an interim frame, designed for the use of proven, state-of-the-art frame-based optical flow computation methods. We evaluate our approach on both low- and high-resolution driving sequences, and show that it often achieves better results than the current state of the art, while also reaching higher frame rates, 250Hz at 346 x 260 pixels and 77Hz at 1280 x 720 pixels.
abstract_zh: 事件摄像机捕捉观察场景中的照明变化，而不是累积光线来创建图像。因此，它们适用于高速运动和复杂照明条件下的应用，而传统的基于帧的传感器在模糊和曝光过度或曝光不足的像素方面表现出了局限性。由于这些独特的特性，它们如今成为 ITS 相关应用中极具吸引力的传感器。随着这些神经形态相机的普及，基于事件的光流（EBOF）得到了研究。然而，最近出现的高清神经形态传感器对现有方法提出了挑战，因为事件像素阵列的分辨率提高了，吞吐量也更高了。作为对这些问题的回答，我们提出了一个优化框架，用于使用低分辨率和高分辨率事件相机实时计算光流。我们以“反指数距离表面”的形式为稀疏事件流制定了一种新颖的密集表示。它充当临时框架，专为使用经过验证的、最先进的基于框架的光流计算方法而设计。我们在低分辨率和高分辨率驱动序列上评估了我们的方法，结果表明，它通常能取得比当前最先进技术更好的结果，同时还达到更高的帧速率，346 x 260 像素时为 250Hz，1280 x 720 像素时为 77Hz。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种优化框架，用于在低分辨率和高分辨率事件相机上实时计算光流，以提升车辆感知性能。
AI.motivation: 传统基于帧的传感器在高速运动和复杂光照条件下存在模糊和曝光问题，而高分辨率事件相机的出现对现有光流方法提出了更高要求。
AI.method: 提出一种新型密集表示方法——'逆指数距离表面'，作为中间帧，结合成熟的帧间光流算法实现高效计算。
AI.result: 在低分辨率（250Hz@346x260）和高分辨率（77Hz@1280x720）驾驶序列测试中，性能优于现有方法且帧率更高。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效解决了高分辨率事件相机的实时光流计算问题，为车辆感知提供了可靠方案。

title: Image-free multi-character recognition
title_zh: 无图像多字符识别
abstract: The recently developed image-free sensing technique maintains the advantages of both the light hardware and software, which has been applied in simple target classification and motion tracking. In practical applications, however, there usually exist multiple targets in the field of view, where existing trials fail to produce multi-semantic information. In this letter, we report a novel image-free sensing technique to tackle the multi-target recognition challenge for the first time. Different from the convolutional layer stack of image-free single-pixel networks, the reported CRNN network utilities the bidirectional LSTM architecture to predict the distribution of multiple characters simultaneously. The framework enables to capture the long-range dependencies, providing a high recognition accuracy of multiple characters. We demonstrated the technique's effectiveness in license plate detection, which achieved 87.60% recognition accuracy at a 5% sampling rate with a higher than 100 FPS refresh rate.
summary: The recently developed image-free sensing technique maintains the advantages of both the light hardware and software, which has been applied in simple target classification and motion tracking. In practical applications, however, there usually exist multiple targets in the field of view, where existing trials fail to produce multi-semantic information. In this letter, we report a novel image-free sensing technique to tackle the multi-target recognition challenge for the first time. Different from the convolutional layer stack of image-free single-pixel networks, the reported CRNN network utilities the bidirectional LSTM architecture to predict the distribution of multiple characters simultaneously. The framework enables to capture the long-range dependencies, providing a high recognition accuracy of multiple characters. We demonstrated the technique's effectiveness in license plate detection, which achieved 87.60% recognition accuracy at a 5% sampling rate with a higher than 100 FPS refresh rate.
abstract_zh: 最近开发的无图像传感技术保持了轻硬件和软件的优点，已应用于简单的目标分类和运动跟踪。然而，在实际应用中，视野中通常存在多个目标，现有试验无法产生多语义信息。在这封信中，我们首次报告了一种新颖的无图像传感技术来应对多目标识别挑战。与无图像单像素网络的卷积层堆栈不同，所报道的 CRNN 网络利用双向 LSTM 架构来同时预测多个字符的分布。该框架能够捕获远程依赖性，提供多个字符的高识别精度。我们展示了该技术在车牌检测方面的有效性，在 5% 采样率和高于 100 FPS 的刷新率下实现了 87.60% 的识别准确率。

AI.tldr: 提出一种无图像多字符识别技术，解决多目标场景下的识别难题。
AI.motivation: 现有无图像传感技术难以处理多目标场景中的多语义信息，需新方法提升识别能力。
AI.method: 采用CRNN网络结合双向LSTM架构，同时预测多字符分布以捕捉长距离依赖。
AI.result: 车牌检测中达87.60%识别准确率（5%采样率，＞100 FPS刷新率）。
AI.conclusion: 验证了技术在实际应用中的有效性，为多目标识别提供新思路。

title: From Robot Self-Localization to Global-Localization: An RSSI Based Approach
title_zh: 从机器人自我定位到全球定位：基于 RSSI 的方法
abstract: Localization is a crucial task for autonomous mobile robots in order to successfully move to goal locations in their environment. Usually, this is done in a robot-centric manner, where the robot maintains a map with its body in the center. In swarm robotics applications, where a group of robots needs to coordinate in order to achieve their common goals, robot-centric localization will not suffice as each member of the swarm has its own frame of reference. One way to deal with this problem is to create, maintain and share a common map (global coordinate system), among the members of the swarm. This paper presents an approach to global localization for a group of robots in unknown, GPS and landmark free environments that extends the localization scheme of the LadyBug algorithm. The main idea relies on members of the swarm staying still and acting as beacons, emitting electromagnetic signals. These stationary robots form a global frame of reference and the rest of the group localize themselves in it using the Received Signal Strength Indicator (RSSI). The proposed method is evaluated, and the results obtained from the experiments are promising.
summary: Localization is a crucial task for autonomous mobile robots in order to successfully move to goal locations in their environment. Usually, this is done in a robot-centric manner, where the robot maintains a map with its body in the center. In swarm robotics applications, where a group of robots needs to coordinate in order to achieve their common goals, robot-centric localization will not suffice as each member of the swarm has its own frame of reference. One way to deal with this problem is to create, maintain and share a common map (global coordinate system), among the members of the swarm. This paper presents an approach to global localization for a group of robots in unknown, GPS and landmark free environments that extends the localization scheme of the LadyBug algorithm. The main idea relies on members of the swarm staying still and acting as beacons, emitting electromagnetic signals. These stationary robots form a global frame of reference and the rest of the group localize themselves in it using the Received Signal Strength Indicator (RSSI). The proposed method is evaluated, and the results obtained from the experiments are promising.
abstract_zh: 定位是自主移动机器人成功移动到环境中的目标位置的一项关键任务。通常，这是以以机器人为中心的方式完成的，其中机器人维护一张以其身体为中心的地图。在群体机器人应用中，一组机器人需要协调才能实现其共同目标，以机器人为中心的定位是不够的，因为群体的每个成员都有自己的参考系。处理这个问题的一种方法是在群体成员之间创建、维护和共享一个公共地图（全局坐标系）。本文提出了一种在未知、GPS 和无地标环境中对一组机器人进行全局定位的方法，该方法扩展了 LadyBug 算法的定位方案。主要思想是让蜂群成员保持静止并充当信标，发射电磁信号。这些固定机器人形成了一个全局参考系，其余机器人则使用接收信号强度指示器 (RSSI) 在其中进行定位。对所提出的方法进行了评估，并且从实验中获得的结果是有希望的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于RSSI的全局定位方法，用于解决群体机器人在无GPS和地标环境中的协同定位问题。
AI.motivation: 传统机器人定位方法以自身为中心，无法满足群体机器人需要共享全局坐标系的协作需求。
AI.method: 扩展LadyBug算法，利用静止机器人作为信标发射电磁信号，其他成员通过RSSI值在全局坐标系中定位。
AI.result: 实验验证了该方法在未知环境中的有效性，结果具有前景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为无GPS环境下的群体机器人全局定位提供了可行解决方案。

search_text: From Robot Self-Localization to Global-Localization: An RSSI Based Approach 从机器人自我定位到全球定位：基于 RSSI 的方法 Localization is a crucial task for autonomous mobile robots in order to successfully move to goal locations in their environment. Usually, this is done in a robot-centric manner, where the robot maintains a map with its body in the center. In swarm robotics applications, where a group of robots needs to coordinate in order to achieve their common goals, robot-centric localization will not suffice as each member of the swarm has its own frame of reference. One way to deal with this problem is to create, maintain and share a common map (global coordinate system), among the members of the swarm. This paper presents an approach to global localization for a group of robots in unknown, GPS and landmark free environments that extends the localization scheme of the LadyBug algorithm. The main idea relies on members of the swarm staying still and acting as beacons, emitting electromagnetic signals. These stationary robots form a global frame of reference and the rest of the group localize themselves in it using the Received Signal Strength Indicator (RSSI). The proposed method is evaluated, and the results obtained from the experiments are promising. 定位是自主移动机器人成功移动到环境中的目标位置的一项关键任务。通常，这是以以机器人为中心的方式完成的，其中机器人维护一张以其身体为中心的地图。在群体机器人应用中，一组机器人需要协调才能实现其共同目标，以机器人为中心的定位是不够的，因为群体的每个成员都有自己的参考系。处理这个问题的一种方法是在群体成员之间创建、维护和共享一个公共地图（全局坐标系）。本文提出了一种在未知、GPS 和无地标环境中对一组机器人进行全局定位的方法，该方法扩展了 LadyBug 算法的定位方案。主要思想是让蜂群成员保持静止并充当信标，发射电磁信号。这些固定机器人形成了一个全局参考系，其余机器人则使用接收信号强度指示器 (RSSI) 在其中进行定位。对所提出的方法进行了评估，并且从实验中获得的结果是有希望的。 本文提出一种基于RSSI的全局定位方法，用于解决群体机器人在无GPS和地标环境中的协同定位问题。 Athanasios Lentzas,Dimitris Vrakas cs.RO

title: NFTGAN: Non-Fungible Token Art Generation Using Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: NFTGAN：使用生成对抗网络生成不可替代的代币艺术
comment: Submitted to the 7th International Conference on Machine Learning Technologies
comments: Submitted to the 7th International Conference on Machine Learning Technologies
abstract: Digital arts have gained an unprecedented level of popularity with the emergence of non-fungible tokens (NFTs). NFTs are cryptographic assets that are stored on blockchain networks and represent a digital certificate of ownership that cannot be forged. NFTs can be incorporated into a smart contract which allows the owner to benefit from a future sale percentage. While digital art producers can benefit immensely with NFTs, their production is time consuming. Therefore, this paper explores the possibility of using generative adversarial networks (GANs) for automatic generation of digital arts. GANs are deep learning architectures that are widely and effectively used for synthesis of audio, images, and video contents. However, their application to NFT arts have been limited. In this paper, a GAN-based architecture is implemented and evaluated for novel NFT-style digital arts generation. Results from the qualitative case study indicate that the generated artworks are comparable to the real samples in terms of being interesting and inspiring and they were judged to be more innovative than real samples.

NFTs are cryptographic assets that are stored on blockchain networks and represent a digital certificate of ownership that cannot be forged. NFTs can be incorporated into a smart contract which allows the owner to benefit from a future sale percentage. While digital art producers can benefit immensely with NFTs, their production is time consuming. Therefore, this paper explores the possibility of using generative adversarial networks (GANs) for automatic generation of digital arts. GANs are deep learning architectures that are widely and effectively used for synthesis of audio, images, and video contents. However, their application to NFT arts have been limited. In this paper, a GAN-based architecture is implemented and evaluated for novel NFT-style digital arts generation. Results from the qualitative case study indicate that the generated artworks are comparable to the real samples in terms of being interesting and inspiring and they were judged to be more innovative than real samples.
abstract_zh: 随着不可替代代币（NFT）的出现，数字艺术获得了前所未有的受欢迎程度。 NFT 是存储在区块链网络上的加密资产，代表着无法伪造的数字所有权证书。 NFT 可以纳入智能合约中，让所有者从未来的销售百分比中受益。虽然数字艺术制作人可以从 NFT 中获益匪浅，但他们的制作非常耗时。因此，本文探讨了使用生成对抗网络（GAN）自动生成数字艺术的可能性。 GAN 是深度学习架构，广泛有效地用于音频、图像和视频内容的合成。然而，它们在 NFT 艺术中的应用受到了限制。在本文中，基于 GAN 的架构被实现并评估用于新颖的 NFT 风格的数字艺术生成。定性案例研究的结果表明，生成的艺术品在有趣和鼓舞人心方面与真实样本相当，并且被认为比真实样本更具创新性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的NFT艺术品自动生成方法
AI.motivation: NFT数字艺术创作耗时且成本高，而GAN在媒体生成领域表现优异但尚未充分应用于NFT艺术
AI.method: 设计并实现一种GAN架构，通过对抗训练生成具有NFT风格特征的数字艺术作品，并进行定性案例研究评估
AI.result: 生成作品在趣味性与创新性方面达到真实样本水平，且被判定具有更高创新价值
AI.conclusion: 验证了GAN在NFT艺术生成领域的可行性，为自动化数字艺术创作提供了新方法论

authors_text: Xinzhe Han,Shuhui Wang,Chi Su,Qingming Huang,Qi Tian
title: General Greedy De-bias Learning
title_zh: 一般贪婪去偏见学习
comment: This work has been accepted by IEEE T-PAMI. Copyright is transferred without notice, after which this version may no longer be accessible
comments: This work has been accepted by IEEE T-PAMI. Copyright is transferred without notice, after which this version may no longer be accessible
abstract: Neural networks often make predictions relying on the spurious correlations from the datasets rather than the intrinsic properties of the task of interest, facing sharp degradation on out-of-distribution (OOD) test data. Existing de-bias learning frameworks try to capture specific dataset bias by annotations but they fail to handle complicated OOD scenarios. Others implicitly identify the dataset bias by special design low capability biased models or losses, but they degrade when the training and testing data are from the same distribution. In this paper, we propose a General Greedy De-bias learning framework (GGD), which greedily trains the biased models and the base model. The base model is encouraged to focus on examples that are hard to solve with biased models, thus remaining robust against spurious correlations in the test stage. GGD largely improves models' OOD generalization ability on various tasks, but sometimes over-estimates the bias level and degrades on the in-distribution test. We further re-analyze the ensemble process of GGD and introduce the Curriculum Regularization inspired by curriculum learning, which achieves a good trade-off between in-distribution and out-of-distribution performance. Extensive experiments on image classification, adversarial question answering, and visual question answering demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. GGD can learn a more robust base model under the settings of both task-specific biased models with prior knowledge and self-ensemble biased model without prior knowledge.
summary: Neural networks often make predictions relying on the spurious correlations from the datasets rather than the intrinsic properties of the task of interest, facing sharp degradation on out-of-distribution (OOD) test data. Existing de-bias learning frameworks try to capture specific dataset bias by annotations but they fail to handle complicated OOD scenarios. Others implicitly identify the dataset bias by special design low capability biased models or losses, but they degrade when the training and testing data are from the same distribution. In this paper, we propose a General Greedy De-bias learning framework (GGD), which greedily trains the biased models and the base model. The base model is encouraged to focus on examples that are hard to solve with biased models, thus remaining robust against spurious correlations in the test stage. GGD largely improves models' OOD generalization ability on various tasks, but sometimes over-estimates the bias level and degrades on the in-distribution test. We further re-analyze the ensemble process of GGD and introduce the Curriculum Regularization inspired by curriculum learning, which achieves a good trade-off between in-distribution and out-of-distribution performance. Extensive experiments on image classification, adversarial question answering, and visual question answering demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. GGD can learn a more robust base model under the settings of both task-specific biased models with prior knowledge and self-ensemble biased model without prior knowledge.
abstract_zh: 神经网络通常依赖于数据集中的虚假相关性而不是感兴趣任务的内在属性来进行预测，面临分布外（OOD）测试数据的急剧退化。现有的去偏差学习框架试图通过注释来捕获特定的数据集偏差，但它们无法处理复杂的 OOD 场景。其他人通过特殊设计的低能力偏差模型或损失隐式地识别数据集偏差，但当训练和测试数据来自同一分布时，它们会降低。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用贪婪去偏差学习框架（GGD），它贪婪地训练有偏差的模型和基础模型。鼓励基本模型重点关注难以用有偏差模型解决的示例，从而在测试阶段保持对虚假相关性的鲁棒性。 GGD 很大程度上提高了模型在各种任务上的 OOD 泛化能力，但有时会高估偏差水平并降低分布内测试的性能。我们进一步重新分析了GGD的集成过程，并引入了受课程学习启发的课程正则化，实现了分布内和分布外性能之间的良好权衡。关于图像分类、对抗性问答和视觉问答的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 GGD可以在具有先验知识的特定任务偏置模型和无先验知识的自集成偏置模型的设置下学习更鲁棒的基础模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通用贪心去偏学习框架（GGD），旨在提升神经网络在分布外（OOD）数据上的泛化能力，通过训练带有偏见的模型和基础模型，使基础模型专注于解决偏见模型难以处理的样本。
AI.motivation: 现有去偏学习方法依赖标注或低能力偏见模型，无法有效处理复杂OOD场景，且在同分布数据上表现下降。需设计无需标注且兼顾同分布与OOD性能的框架。
AI.method: GGD通过贪心训练偏见模型与基础模型，引导基础模型关注偏见模型难以解决的困难样本。引入课程正则化（Curriculum Regularization），平衡同分布与OOD性能。
AI.result: GGD在图像分类、对抗问答等任务中显著提升OOD性能，但偶有高估偏见导致同分布性能下降。课程正则化有效缓解此问题，验证方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: GGD通过结合任务特定偏见模型与自集成偏见模型，提升鲁棒性。课程正则化实现同分布与OOD性能的平衡，为去偏学习提供新思路。

motivation: 现有去偏学习方法依赖标注或低能力偏见模型，无法有效处理复杂OOD场景，且在同分布数据上表现下降。需设计无需标注且兼顾同分布与OOD性能的框架。
method: GGD通过贪心训练偏见模型与基础模型，引导基础模型关注偏见模型难以解决的困难样本。引入课程正则化（Curriculum Regularization），平衡同分布与OOD性能。
result: GGD在图像分类、对抗问答等任务中显著提升OOD性能，但偶有高估偏见导致同分布性能下降。课程正则化有效缓解此问题，验证方法有效性。
conclusion: GGD通过结合任务特定偏见模型与自集成偏见模型，提升鲁棒性。课程正则化实现同分布与OOD性能的平衡，为去偏学习提供新思路。
search_text: General Greedy De-bias Learning 一般贪婪去偏见学习 Neural networks often make predictions relying on the spurious correlations from the datasets rather than the intrinsic properties of the task of interest, facing sharp degradation on out-of-distribution (OOD) test data. Existing de-bias learning frameworks try to capture specific dataset bias by annotations but they fail to handle complicated OOD scenarios. Others implicitly identify the dataset bias by special design low capability biased models or losses, but they degrade when the training and testing data are from the same distribution. In this paper, we propose a General Greedy De-bias learning framework (GGD), which greedily trains the biased models and the base model. The base model is encouraged to focus on examples that are hard to solve with biased models, thus remaining robust against spurious correlations in the test stage. GGD largely improves models' OOD generalization ability on various tasks, but sometimes over-estimates the bias level and degrades on the in-distribution test. We further re-analyze the ensemble process of GGD and introduce the Curriculum Regularization inspired by curriculum learning, which achieves a good trade-off between in-distribution and out-of-distribution performance. Extensive experiments on image classification, adversarial question answering, and visual question answering demonstrate the effectiveness of our method. GGD can learn a more robust base model under the settings of both task-specific biased models with prior knowledge and self-ensemble biased model without prior knowledge. 神经网络通常依赖于数据集中的虚假相关性而不是感兴趣任务的内在属性来进行预测，面临分布外（OOD）测试数据的急剧退化。现有的去偏差学习框架试图通过注释来捕获特定的数据集偏差，但它们无法处理复杂的 OOD 场景。其他人通过特殊设计的低能力偏差模型或损失隐式地识别数据集偏差，但当训练和测试数据来自同一分布时，它们会降低。在本文中，我们提出了一种通用贪婪去偏差学习框架（GGD），它贪婪地训练有偏差的模型和基础模型。鼓励基本模型重点关注难以用有偏差模型解决的示例，从而在测试阶段保持对虚假相关性的鲁棒性。 GGD 很大程度上提高了模型在各种任务上的 OOD 泛化能力，但有时会高估偏差水平并降低分布内测试的性能。我们进一步重新分析了GGD的集成过程，并引入了受课程学习启发的课程正则化，实现了分布内和分布外性能之间的良好权衡。关于图像分类、对抗性问答和视觉问答的大量实验证明了我们方法的有效性。 GGD可以在具有先验知识的特定任务偏置模型和无先验知识的自集成偏置模型的设置下学习更鲁棒的基础模型。 本文提出一种通用贪心去偏学习框架（GGD），旨在提升神经网络在分布外（OOD）数据上的泛化能力，通过训练带有偏见的模型和基础模型，使基础模型专注于解决偏见模型难以处理的样本。 Xinzhe Han,Shuhui Wang,Chi Su,Qingming Huang,Qi Tian cs.LG,cs.CV

authors_text: Jinfeng Wei,Yunxin Wang,Mengli Guo,Pei Lv,Xiaoshan Yang,Mingliang Xu
title: Dynamic Hypergraph Convolutional Networks for Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
title_zh: 用于基于骨架的动作识别的动态超图卷积网络
abstract: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) based methods have achieved advanced performance on skeleton-based action recognition task. However, the skeleton graph cannot fully represent the motion information contained in skeleton data. In addition, the topology of the skeleton graph in the GCN-based methods is manually set according to natural connections, and it is fixed for all samples, which cannot well adapt to different situations. In this work, we propose a novel dynamic hypergraph convolutional networks (DHGCN) for skeleton-based action recognition. DHGCN uses hypergraph to represent the skeleton structure to effectively exploit the motion information contained in human joints. Each joint in the skeleton hypergraph is dynamically assigned the corresponding weight according to its moving, and the hypergraph topology in our model can be dynamically adjusted to different samples according to the relationship between the joints. Experimental results demonstrate that the performance of our model achieves competitive performance on three datasets: Kinetics-Skeleton 400, NTU RGB+D 60, and NTU RGB+D 120.
summary: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) based methods have achieved advanced performance on skeleton-based action recognition task. However, the skeleton graph cannot fully represent the motion information contained in skeleton data. In addition, the topology of the skeleton graph in the GCN-based methods is manually set according to natural connections, and it is fixed for all samples, which cannot well adapt to different situations. In this work, we propose a novel dynamic hypergraph convolutional networks (DHGCN) for skeleton-based action recognition. DHGCN uses hypergraph to represent the skeleton structure to effectively exploit the motion information contained in human joints. Each joint in the skeleton hypergraph is dynamically assigned the corresponding weight according to its moving, and the hypergraph topology in our model can be dynamically adjusted to different samples according to the relationship between the joints. Experimental results demonstrate that the performance of our model achieves competitive performance on three datasets: Kinetics-Skeleton 400, NTU RGB+D 60, and NTU RGB+D 120.
abstract_zh: 基于图卷积网络（GCN）的方法在基于骨架的动作识别任务上取得了先进的性能。然而，骨骼图并不能完全表示骨骼数据中包含的运动信息。此外，基于GCN的方法中骨架图的拓扑是根据自然连接手动设置的，并且对于所有样本都是固定的，不能很好地适应不同的情况。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的动态超图卷积网络（DHGCN），用于基于骨架的动作识别。 DHGCN使用超图来表示骨骼结构，以有效地利用人体关节中包含的运动信息。骨架超图中的每个关节根据其移动动态分配相应的权重，并且我们模型中的超图拓扑可以根据关节之间的关系动态调整到不同的样本。实验结果表明，我们的模型在三个数据集上的性能达到了有竞争力的性能：Kinetics-Skeleton 400、NTU RGB+D 60 和 NTU RGB+D 120。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态超图卷积网络（DHGCN），用于基于骨架的动作识别任务。
AI.motivation: 传统图卷积网络（GCN）在骨架动作识别中存在两个不足：1）骨架图无法充分表示运动信息；2）手动设定的固定拓扑结构难以适应不同样本的动态变化。
AI.method: 设计动态超图结构，通过关节运动动态分配权重，并根据关节间关系自适应调整超图拓扑，以更有效地捕捉骨架数据中的运动特征。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-Skeleton 400、NTU RGB+D 60和NTU RGB+D 120三个数据集上均取得具有竞争力的识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 动态超图卷积网络通过自适应拓扑调整和运动感知权重分配，有效提升了骨架动作识别的准确率。

title: Scope and Sense of Explainability for AI-Systems
title_zh: 人工智能系统的可解释性范围和意义
abstract: Certain aspects of the explainability of AI systems will be critically discussed. This especially with focus on the feasibility of the task of making every AI system explainable. Emphasis will be given to difficulties related to the explainability of highly complex and efficient AI systems which deliver decisions whose explanation defies classical logical schemes of cause and effect. AI systems have provably delivered unintelligible solutions which in retrospect were characterized as ingenious (for example move 37 of the game 2 of AlphaGo). It will be elaborated on arguments supporting the notion that if AI-solutions were to be discarded in advance because of their not being thoroughly comprehensible, a great deal of the potentiality of intelligent systems would be wasted.
summary: Certain aspects of the explainability of AI systems will be critically discussed. This especially with focus on the feasibility of the task of making every AI system explainable. Emphasis will be given to difficulties related to the explainability of highly complex and efficient AI systems which deliver decisions whose explanation defies classical logical schemes of cause and effect. AI systems have provably delivered unintelligible solutions which in retrospect were characterized as ingenious (for example move 37 of the game 2 of AlphaGo). It will be elaborated on arguments supporting the notion that if AI-solutions were to be discarded in advance because of their not being thoroughly comprehensible, a great deal of the potentiality of intelligent systems would be wasted.
abstract_zh: 人工智能系统可解释性的某些方面将受到批判性讨论。这尤其关注使每个人工智能系统都可解释的任务的可行性。将重点关注与高度复杂和高效的人工智能系统的可解释性相关的困难，这些系统所做出的决策的解释违背了经典的因果逻辑方案。事实证明，人工智能系统已经提供了难以理解的解决方案，但回想起来，这些解决方案被认为是巧妙的（例如 AlphaGo 第二场比赛的第 37 步）。它将详细阐述支持这样一种观点的论据：如果人工智能解决方案因为不完全可理解而被提前丢弃，那么智能系统的大量潜力将被浪费。

AI.tldr: 探讨AI系统可解释性的范围与意义，分析其可行性及面临的挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着AI系统复杂度增加，传统逻辑难以解释其决策，需探讨强制可解释性是否合理及可能带来的影响。
AI.method: 通过批判性讨论、案例分析和理论论证，探讨可解释性的可行性与挑战。
AI.result: 发现高度复杂AI系统的解释难度大，强制可解释性可能限制其潜力，需权衡可解释性与系统性能。
AI.conclusion: 需在可解释性与AI系统复杂性之间寻求平衡，避免因不可解释性而否定潜在有价值的解决方案。

authors_text: Kamel-Eddine Harabi,Tifenn Hirtzlin,Clément Turck,Elisa Vianello,Raphaël Laurent,Jacques Droulez,Pierre Bessière,Jean-Michel Portal,Marc Bocquet,Damien Querlioz
title: A Memristor-Based Bayesian Machine
title_zh: 基于忆阻器的贝叶斯机
abstract: In recent years, a considerable research effort has shown the energy benefits of implementing neural networks with memristors or other emerging memory technologies. However, for extreme-edge applications with high uncertainty, access to reduced amounts of data, and where explainable decisions are required, neural networks may not provide an acceptable form of intelligence. Bayesian reasoning can solve these concerns, but it is computationally expensive and, unlike neural networks, does not translate naturally to memristor-based architectures. In this work, we introduce, demonstrate experimentally on a fully fabricated hybrid CMOS-memristor system, and analyze a Bayesian machine designed for highly-energy efficient Bayesian reasoning. The architecture of the machine is obtained by writing Bayes' law in a way making its implementation natural by the principles of distributed memory and stochastic computing, allowing the circuit to function using solely local memory and minimal data movement. Measurements on a fabricated small-scale Bayesian machine featuring 2,048 memristors and 30,080 transistors show the viability of this approach and the possibility of overcoming the challenges associated with its design: the inherent imperfections of memristors, as well as the need to distribute very locally higher-than-nominal supply voltages. The design of a scaled-up version of the machine shows its outstanding energy efficiency on a real-life gesture recognition task: a gesture can be recognized using 5,000 times less energy than using a microcontroller unit. The Bayesian machine also features several desirable features, e.g., instant on/off operation, compatibility with low supply voltages, and resilience to single-event upsets. These results open the road for Bayesian reasoning as an attractive way for energy-efficient, robust, and explainable intelligence at the edge.

In this work, we introduce, demonstrate experimentally on a fully fabricated hybrid CMOS-memristor system, and analyze a Bayesian machine designed for highly-energy efficient Bayesian reasoning. The architecture of the machine is obtained by writing Bayes' law in a way making its implementation natural by the principles of distributed memory and stochastic computing, allowing the circuit to function using solely local memory and minimal data movement. Measurements on a fabricated small-scale Bayesian machine featuring 2,048 memristors and 30,080 transistors show the viability of this approach and the possibility of overcoming the challenges associated with its design: the inherent imperfections of memristors, as well as the need to distribute very locally higher-than-nominal supply voltages. The design of a scaled-up version of the machine shows its outstanding energy efficiency on a real-life gesture recognition task: a gesture can be recognized using 5,000 times less energy than using a microcontroller unit. The Bayesian machine also features several desirable features, e.g., instant on/off operation, compatibility with low supply voltages, and resilience to single-event upsets. These results open the road for Bayesian reasoning as an attractive way for energy-efficient, robust, and explainable intelligence at the edge.
abstract_zh: 近年来，大量的研究工作已经证明了使用忆阻器或其他新兴存储技术实现神经网络的能源效益。然而，对于具有高度不确定性、数据量减少以及需要可解释决策的极端边缘应用，神经网络可能无法提供可接受的智能形式。贝叶斯推理可以解决这些问题，但它的计算成本很高，并且与神经网络不同，它不能自然地转化为基于忆阻器的架构。在这项工作中，我们介绍并在完全制造的混合 CMOS 忆阻器系统上进行实验演示，并分析专为高能效贝叶斯推理而设计的贝叶斯机器。该机器的架构是通过编写贝叶斯定律获得的，其实现方式通过分布式内存和随机计算的原理变得自然，允许电路仅使用本地内存和最少的数据移动来运行。对具有 2,048 个忆阻器和 30,080 个晶体管的小型贝叶斯机器进行的测量表明了这种方法的可行性以及克服与其设计相关的挑战的可能性：忆阻器的固有缺陷，以及需要在本地分配高于标称的电源电压。该机器放大版的设计在现实生活中的手势识别任务中展示了其出色的能源效率：识别手势所需的能源比使用微控制器单元少 5,000 倍。贝叶斯机器还具有几个理想的特性，例如即时开/关操作、与低电源电压的兼容性以及对单事件干扰的恢复能力。这些结果为贝叶斯推理开辟了道路，使其成为一种有吸引力的节能、稳健和可解释的边缘智能方式。

AI.tldr: 本文设计并实验验证了一种基于忆阻器的贝叶斯机器，旨在实现高效、可解释的边缘计算智能。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络在极端边缘场景下存在数据量少、不确定性高和可解释性差的问题，而贝叶斯推理虽能解决这些问题，但计算成本高且难以适配忆阻器架构。
AI.method: 通过将贝叶斯定律与分布式存储和随机计算结合，设计了一种仅依赖本地存储和最小数据移动的忆阻器-CMOS混合架构，并在实际芯片上验证其可行性。
AI.result: 实验显示该机器可实现手势识别任务能耗降低5000倍，且具备瞬时启停、低电压兼容性和抗单粒子翻转等特性。
AI.conclusion: 忆阻器贝叶斯机器为边缘计算提供了高效、鲁棒且可解释的智能解决方案，为未来低功耗AI硬件设计开辟了新方向。

search_text: A Memristor-Based Bayesian Machine 基于忆阻器的贝叶斯机 In recent years, a considerable research effort has shown the energy benefits of implementing neural networks with memristors or other emerging memory technologies. However, for extreme-edge applications with high uncertainty, access to reduced amounts of data, and where explainable decisions are required, neural networks may not provide an acceptable form of intelligence. Bayesian reasoning can solve these concerns, but it is computationally expensive and, unlike neural networks, does not translate naturally to memristor-based architectures. In this work, we introduce, demonstrate experimentally on a fully fabricated hybrid CMOS-memristor system, and analyze a Bayesian machine designed for highly-energy efficient Bayesian reasoning. The architecture of the machine is obtained by writing Bayes' law in a way making its implementation natural by the principles of distributed memory and stochastic computing, allowing the circuit to function using solely local memory and minimal data movement. Measurements on a fabricated small-scale Bayesian machine featuring 2,048 memristors and 30,080 transistors show the viability of this approach and the possibility of overcoming the challenges associated with its design: the inherent imperfections of memristors, as well as the need to distribute very locally higher-than-nominal supply voltages. The design of a scaled-up version of the machine shows its outstanding energy efficiency on a real-life gesture recognition task: a gesture can be recognized using 5,000 times less energy than using a microcontroller unit. The Bayesian machine also features several desirable features, e.g., instant on/off operation, compatibility with low supply voltages, and resilience to single-event upsets. These results open the road for Bayesian reasoning as an attractive way for energy-efficient, robust, and explainable intelligence at the edge. 近年来，大量的研究工作已经证明了使用忆阻器或其他新兴存储技术实现神经网络的能源效益。然而，对于具有高度不确定性、数据量减少以及需要可解释决策的极端边缘应用，神经网络可能无法提供可接受的智能形式。贝叶斯推理可以解决这些问题，但它的计算成本很高，并且与神经网络不同，它不能自然地转化为基于忆阻器的架构。在这项工作中，我们介绍并在完全制造的混合 CMOS 忆阻器系统上进行实验演示，并分析专为高能效贝叶斯推理而设计的贝叶斯机器。该机器的架构是通过编写贝叶斯定律获得的，其实现方式通过分布式内存和随机计算的原理变得自然，允许电路仅使用本地内存和最少的数据移动来运行。对具有 2,048 个忆阻器和 30,080 个晶体管的小型贝叶斯机器进行的测量表明了这种方法的可行性以及克服与其设计相关的挑战的可能性：忆阻器的固有缺陷，以及需要在本地分配高于标称的电源电压。该机器放大版的设计在现实生活中的手势识别任务中展示了其出色的能源效率：识别手势所需的能源比使用微控制器单元少 5,000 倍。贝叶斯机器还具有几个理想的特性，例如即时开/关操作、与低电源电压的兼容性以及对单事件干扰的恢复能力。这些结果为贝叶斯推理开辟了道路，使其成为一种有吸引力的节能、稳健和可解释的边缘智能方式。 本文设计并实验验证了一种基于忆阻器的贝叶斯机器，旨在实现高效、可解释的边缘计算智能。 Kamel-Eddine Harabi,Tifenn Hirtzlin,Clément Turck,Elisa Vianello,Raphaël Laurent,Jacques Droulez,Pierre Bessière,Jean-Michel Portal,Marc Bocquet,Damien Querlioz cs.ET

title: Spiral Language Modeling
title_zh: 螺旋语言模型
abstract: In almost all text generation applications, word sequences are constructed in a left-to-right (L2R) or right-to-left (R2L) manner, as natural language sentences are written either L2R or R2L. However, we find that the natural language written order is not essential for text generation. In this paper, we propose Spiral Language Modeling (SLM), a general approach that enables one to construct natural language sentences beyond the L2R and R2L order. SLM allows one to form natural language text by starting from an arbitrary token inside the result text and expanding the rest tokens around the selected ones. It makes the decoding order a new optimization objective besides the language model perplexity, which further improves the diversity and quality of the generated text. Furthermore, SLM makes it possible to manipulate the text construction process by selecting a proper starting token. SLM also introduces generation orderings as additional regularization to improve model robustness in low-resource scenarios. Experiments on 8 widely studied Neural Machine Translation (NMT) tasks show that SLM is constantly effective with up to 4.7 BLEU increase comparing to the conventional L2R decoding approach.
summary: In almost all text generation applications, word sequences are constructed in a left-to-right (L2R) or right-to-left (R2L) manner, as natural language sentences are written either L2R or R2L. However, we find that the natural language written order is not essential for text generation. In this paper, we propose Spiral Language Modeling (SLM), a general approach that enables one to construct natural language sentences beyond the L2R and R2L order. SLM allows one to form natural language text by starting from an arbitrary token inside the result text and expanding the rest tokens around the selected ones. It makes the decoding order a new optimization objective besides the language model perplexity, which further improves the diversity and quality of the generated text. Furthermore, SLM makes it possible to manipulate the text construction process by selecting a proper starting token. SLM also introduces generation orderings as additional regularization to improve model robustness in low-resource scenarios. Experiments on 8 widely studied Neural Machine Translation (NMT) tasks show that SLM is constantly effective with up to 4.7 BLEU increase comparing to the conventional L2R decoding approach.
abstract_zh: 在几乎所有文本生成应用中，单词序列都是以从左到右 (L2R) 或从右到左 (R2L) 的方式构建的，就像自然语言句子以 L2R 或 R2L 编写一样。然而，我们发现自然语言书写顺序对于文本生成并不重要。在本文中，我们提出了螺旋语言建模（SLM），这是一种通用方法，使人们能够构建超越 L2R 和 R2L 顺序的自然语言句子。 SLM 允许人们通过从结果文本中的任意标记开始并围绕所选标记扩展其余标记来形成自然语言文本。使得解码顺序成为语言模型复杂度之外新的优化目标，进一步提高了生成文本的多样性和质量。此外，SLM 可以通过选择适当的起始标记来操纵文本构建过程。 SLM 还引入了生成排序作为额外的正则化，以提高模型在资源匮乏的情况下的稳健性。对 8 个广泛研究的神经机器翻译 (NMT) 任务进行的实验表明，与传统的 L2R 解码方法相比，SLM 始终有效，BLEU 提高了高达 4.7 个。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Spiral Language Modeling（SLM）的通用方法，用于生成自然语言文本，突破了传统的从左到右（L2R）或从右到左（R2L）的生成顺序。
AI.motivation: 传统文本生成方法依赖于L2R或R2L的顺序，但作者发现自然语言的书写顺序并非生成文本的必要条件，因此希望探索一种更灵活的生成方式。
AI.method: SLM方法允许从结果文本中的任意标记开始生成，并围绕选定标记扩展其他标记，将解码顺序作为新的优化目标，同时引入生成顺序作为正则化项以提高模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在8个广泛研究的神经机器翻译任务中，SLM相比传统L2R方法最多提升了4.7个BLEU值，显示出其有效性。
AI.conclusion: SLM提供了一种新的文本生成方式，能够提升生成文本的多样性和质量，并在低资源场景下提高模型鲁棒性。

title: Implicit Neural Representation Learning for Hyperspectral Image Super-Resolution
title_zh: 高光谱图像超分辨率的隐式神经表示学习
abstract: Hyperspectral image (HSI) super-resolution without additional auxiliary image remains a constant challenge due to its high-dimensional spectral patterns, where learning an effective spatial and spectral representation is a fundamental issue. Recently, Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) are making strides as a novel and effective representation, especially in the reconstruction task. Therefore, in this work, we propose a novel HSI reconstruction model based on INR which represents HSI by a continuous function mapping a spatial coordinate to its corresponding spectral radiance values. In particular, as a specific implementation of INR, the parameters of parametric model are predicted by a hypernetwork that operates on feature extraction using convolution network. It makes the continuous functions map the spatial coordinates to pixel values in a content-aware manner. Moreover, periodic spatial encoding are deeply integrated with the reconstruction procedure, which makes our model capable of recovering more high frequency details. To verify the efficacy of our model, we conduct experiments on three HSI datasets (CAVE, NUS, and NTIRE2018). Experimental results show that the proposed model can achieve competitive reconstruction performance in comparison with the state-of-the-art methods. In addition, we provide an ablation study on the effect of individual components of our model. We hope this paper could server as a potent reference for future research.
summary: Hyperspectral image (HSI) super-resolution without additional auxiliary image remains a constant challenge due to its high-dimensional spectral patterns, where learning an effective spatial and spectral representation is a fundamental issue. Recently, Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) are making strides as a novel and effective representation, especially in the reconstruction task. Therefore, in this work, we propose a novel HSI reconstruction model based on INR which represents HSI by a continuous function mapping a spatial coordinate to its corresponding spectral radiance values. In particular, as a specific implementation of INR, the parameters of parametric model are predicted by a hypernetwork that operates on feature extraction using convolution network. It makes the continuous functions map the spatial coordinates to pixel values in a content-aware manner. Moreover, periodic spatial encoding are deeply integrated with the reconstruction procedure, which makes our model capable of recovering more high frequency details. To verify the efficacy of our model, we conduct experiments on three HSI datasets (CAVE, NUS, and NTIRE2018). Experimental results show that the proposed model can achieve competitive reconstruction performance in comparison with the state-of-the-art methods. In addition, we provide an ablation study on the effect of individual components of our model. We hope this paper could server as a potent reference for future research.
abstract_zh: 由于其高维光谱模式，无需额外辅助图像的高光谱图像（HSI）超分辨率仍然是一个持续的挑战，其中学习有效的空间和光谱表示是一个基本问题。最近，隐式神经表征（INR）作为一种新颖且有效的表征正在取得长足的进步，特别是在重建任务中。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于INR的新颖的HSI重建模型，该模型通过将空间坐标映射到其相应的光谱辐射亮度值的连续函数来表示HSI。特别地，作为INR的具体实现，参数模型的参数是通过使用卷积网络进行特征提取的超网络来预测的。它使连续函数以内容感知的方式将空间坐标映射到像素值。此外，周期性空间编码与重建过程深度集成，这使得我们的模型能够恢复更多的高频细节。为了验证我们模型的有效性，我们在三个 HSI 数据集（CAVE、NUS 和 NTIRE2018）上进行了实验。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的模型可以实现有竞争力的重建性能。此外，我们还对模型中各个组成部分的影响进行了消融研究。我们希望本文能够为未来的研究提供有力的参考。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于隐式神经表示（INR）的高光谱图像超分辨率重建模型，通过连续函数映射空间坐标到光谱辐射值实现高分辨率重建。
AI.motivation: 高光谱图像超分辨率因高维光谱特征和缺乏辅助图像而面临挑战，传统方法难以有效学习空间-光谱联合表示，需探索新型表征方法。
AI.method: 设计包含超网络的参数化INR模型，通过卷积网络提取特征并预测模型参数，结合周期性空间编码增强高频细节恢复能力。
AI.result: 在CAVE、NUS和NTIRE2018三个数据集上实验表明，该模型重建性能优于现有方法，消融实验证明各组件的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的INR框架有效解决了高光谱图像超分辨率问题，为后续研究提供了可行的技术参考。

search_text: Implicit Neural Representation Learning for Hyperspectral Image Super-Resolution 高光谱图像超分辨率的隐式神经表示学习 Hyperspectral image (HSI) super-resolution without additional auxiliary image remains a constant challenge due to its high-dimensional spectral patterns, where learning an effective spatial and spectral representation is a fundamental issue. Recently, Implicit Neural Representations (INRs) are making strides as a novel and effective representation, especially in the reconstruction task. Therefore, in this work, we propose a novel HSI reconstruction model based on INR which represents HSI by a continuous function mapping a spatial coordinate to its corresponding spectral radiance values. In particular, as a specific implementation of INR, the parameters of parametric model are predicted by a hypernetwork that operates on feature extraction using convolution network. It makes the continuous functions map the spatial coordinates to pixel values in a content-aware manner. Moreover, periodic spatial encoding are deeply integrated with the reconstruction procedure, which makes our model capable of recovering more high frequency details. To verify the efficacy of our model, we conduct experiments on three HSI datasets (CAVE, NUS, and NTIRE2018). Experimental results show that the proposed model can achieve competitive reconstruction performance in comparison with the state-of-the-art methods. In addition, we provide an ablation study on the effect of individual components of our model. We hope this paper could server as a potent reference for future research. 由于其高维光谱模式，无需额外辅助图像的高光谱图像（HSI）超分辨率仍然是一个持续的挑战，其中学习有效的空间和光谱表示是一个基本问题。最近，隐式神经表征（INR）作为一种新颖且有效的表征正在取得长足的进步，特别是在重建任务中。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于INR的新颖的HSI重建模型，该模型通过将空间坐标映射到其相应的光谱辐射亮度值的连续函数来表示HSI。特别地，作为INR的具体实现，参数模型的参数是通过使用卷积网络进行特征提取的超网络来预测的。它使连续函数以内容感知的方式将空间坐标映射到像素值。此外，周期性空间编码与重建过程深度集成，这使得我们的模型能够恢复更多的高频细节。为了验证我们模型的有效性，我们在三个 HSI 数据集（CAVE、NUS 和 NTIRE2018）上进行了实验。实验结果表明，与最先进的方法相比，所提出的模型可以实现有竞争力的重建性能。此外，我们还对模型中各个组成部分的影响进行了消融研究。我们希望本文能够为未来的研究提供有力的参考。 本文提出一种基于隐式神经表示（INR）的高光谱图像超分辨率重建模型，通过连续函数映射空间坐标到光谱辐射值实现高分辨率重建。 Kaiwei Zhang eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Raphael Seidel,Nikolay Tcholtchev,Sebastian Bock,Colin Kai-Uwe Becker,Manfred Hauswirth
title: Efficient Floating Point Arithmetic for Quantum Computers
title_zh: 量子计算机的高效浮点运算
abstract: One of the major promises of quantum computing is the realization of SIMD (single instruction - multiple data) operations using the phenomenon of superposition. Since the dimension of the state space grows exponentially with the number of qubits, we can easily reach situations where we pay less than a single quantum gate per data point for data-processing instructions which would be rather expensive in classical computing. Formulating such instructions in terms of quantum gates, however, still remains a challenging task. Laying out the foundational functions for more advanced data-processing is therefore a subject of paramount importance for advancing the realm of quantum computing. In this paper, we introduce the formalism of encoding so called-semi-boolean polynomials. As it turns out, arithmetic $\mathbb{Z}/2^n\mathbb{Z}$ ring operations can be formulated as semi-boolean polynomial evaluations, which allows convenient generation of unsigned integer arithmetic quantum circuits. For arithmetic evaluations, the resulting algorithm has been known as Fourier-arithmetic. We extend this type of algorithm with additional features, such as ancilla-free in-place multiplication and integer coefficient polynomial evaluation. Furthermore, we introduce a tailor-made method for encoding signed integers succeeded by an encoding for arbitrary floating-point numbers. This representation of floating-point numbers and their processing can be applied to any quantum algorithm that performs unsigned modular integer arithmetic. We discuss some further performance enhancements of the semi boolean polynomial encoder and finally supply a complexity estimation. The application of our methods to a 32-bit unsigned integer multiplication demonstrated a 90\% circuit depth reduction compared to carry-ripple approaches.
summary: One of the major promises of quantum computing is the realization of SIMD (single instruction - multiple data) operations using the phenomenon of superposition. Since the dimension of the state space grows exponentially with the number of qubits, we can easily reach situations where we pay less than a single quantum gate per data point for data-processing instructions which would be rather expensive in classical computing. Formulating such instructions in terms of quantum gates, however, still remains a challenging task. Laying out the foundational functions for more advanced data-processing is therefore a subject of paramount importance for advancing the realm of quantum computing. In this paper, we introduce the formalism of encoding so called-semi-boolean polynomials. As it turns out, arithmetic $\mathbb{Z}/2^n\mathbb{Z}$ ring operations can be formulated as semi-boolean polynomial evaluations, which allows convenient generation of unsigned integer arithmetic quantum circuits. For arithmetic evaluations, the resulting algorithm has been known as Fourier-arithmetic. We extend this type of algorithm with additional features, such as ancilla-free in-place multiplication and integer coefficient polynomial evaluation. Furthermore, we introduce a tailor-made method for encoding signed integers succeeded by an encoding for arbitrary floating-point numbers. This representation of floating-point numbers and their processing can be applied to any quantum algorithm that performs unsigned modular integer arithmetic. We discuss some further performance enhancements of the semi boolean polynomial encoder and finally supply a complexity estimation. The application of our methods to a 32-bit unsigned integer multiplication demonstrated a 90\% circuit depth reduction compared to carry-ripple approaches.
abstract_zh: 量子计算的主要前景之一是利用叠加现象实现 SIMD（单指令 - 多数据）运算。由于状态空间的维度随着量子位的数量呈指数增长，因此我们很容易达到这样的情况：我们为数据处理指令支付的费用少于每个数据点的单个量子门，这在经典计算中相当昂贵。然而，根据量子门制定此类指令仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。因此，为更先进的数据处理奠定基础功能对于推进量子计算领域至关重要。在本文中，我们介绍了所谓的半布尔多项式的编码形式。事实证明，算术 $\mathbb{Z}/2^n\mathbb{Z}$ 环运算可以表示为半布尔多项式计算，从而可以方便地生成无符号整数算术量子电路。对于算术评估，所得算法被称为傅里叶算术。我们用附加功能扩展了这种类型的算法，例如无辅助就地乘法和整数系数多项式评估。此外，我们引入了一种定制的方法，用于对有符号整数进行编码，然后对任意浮点数进行编码。浮点数的这种表示及其处理可以应用于执行无符号模整数算术的任何量子算法。我们讨论了半布尔多项式编码器的一些进一步的性能增强，并最终提供了复杂性估计。将我们的方法应用于 32 位无符号整数乘法，与进位纹波方法相比，电路深度减少了 90%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于半布尔多项式的高效浮点数算术方法，用于优化量子计算机中的量子电路设计。
AI.motivation: 量子计算通过叠加态实现 SIMD 操作，但将数据处理指令转化为量子门仍具挑战性，需开发高效算术方法以推动量子算法发展。
AI.method: 通过半布尔多项式编码实现模环运算，扩展傅里叶算术算法，引入无辅助位乘法和整数系数多项式评估，并设计浮点数编码方法。
AI.result: 32 位无符号整数乘法的电路深度较传统进位链方法减少 90%，显著提升量子电路效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为量子计算机中的浮点运算提供了高效框架，适用于需模整数算术的量子算法，推动量子计算实用化。

title: Object Recognition as Classification via Visual Properties
title_zh: 通过视觉属性进行对象识别和分类
abstract: We base our work on the teleosemantic modelling of concepts as abilities implementing the distinct functions of recognition and classification. Accordingly, we model two types of concepts - substance concepts suited for object recognition exploiting visual properties, and classification concepts suited for classification of substance concepts exploiting linguistically grounded properties. The goal in this paper is to demonstrate that object recognition can be construed as classification via visual properties, as distinct from work in mainstream computer vision. Towards that, we present an object recognition process based on Ranganathan's four-phased faceted knowledge organization process, grounded in the teleosemantic distinctions of substance concept and classification concept. We also briefly introduce the ongoing project MultiMedia UKC, whose aim is to build an object recognition resource following our proposed process
summary: We base our work on the teleosemantic modelling of concepts as abilities implementing the distinct functions of recognition and classification. Accordingly, we model two types of concepts - substance concepts suited for object recognition exploiting visual properties, and classification concepts suited for classification of substance concepts exploiting linguistically grounded properties. The goal in this paper is to demonstrate that object recognition can be construed as classification via visual properties, as distinct from work in mainstream computer vision. Towards that, we present an object recognition process based on Ranganathan's four-phased faceted knowledge organization process, grounded in the teleosemantic distinctions of substance concept and classification concept. We also briefly introduce the ongoing project MultiMedia UKC, whose aim is to build an object recognition resource following our proposed process
abstract_zh: 我们的工作基于概念的远程语义建模，作为实现识别和分类的不同功能的能力。因此，我们对两种类型的概念进行建模——适合利用视觉属性进行对象识别的物质概念，以及适合利用基于语言的属性对物质概念进行分类的分类概念。本文的目标是证明对象识别可以被解释为通过视觉属性进行分类，这与主流计算机视觉中的工作不同。为此，我们提出了一种基于 Ranganathan 的四阶段分面知识组织过程的对象识别过程，该过程以物质概念和分类概念的目的语义区别为基础。我们还简要介绍了正在进行的 MultiMedia UKC 项目，其目的是按照我们提出的流程构建对象识别资源

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过视觉属性将物体识别解释为分类过程，区别于主流计算机视觉方法。
AI.motivation: 传统计算机视觉方法未明确区分识别与分类的概念，且缺乏对视觉属性与语言属性的整合。
AI.method: 基于Ranganathan的四阶段知识组织流程，结合teleosemantic模型中的物质概念与分类概念区分，构建物体识别框架。
AI.result: 验证了通过视觉属性进行物体识别作为分类的可行性，并启动了MultiMedia UKC项目以构建相关资源。
AI.conclusion: 提出的新框架为物体识别与分类的整合提供了理论基础，有助于跨学科研究的发展。

search_text: Object Recognition as Classification via Visual Properties 通过视觉属性进行对象识别和分类 We base our work on the teleosemantic modelling of concepts as abilities implementing the distinct functions of recognition and classification. Accordingly, we model two types of concepts - substance concepts suited for object recognition exploiting visual properties, and classification concepts suited for classification of substance concepts exploiting linguistically grounded properties. The goal in this paper is to demonstrate that object recognition can be construed as classification via visual properties, as distinct from work in mainstream computer vision. Towards that, we present an object recognition process based on Ranganathan's four-phased faceted knowledge organization process, grounded in the teleosemantic distinctions of substance concept and classification concept. We also briefly introduce the ongoing project MultiMedia UKC, whose aim is to build an object recognition resource following our proposed process 我们的工作基于概念的远程语义建模，作为实现识别和分类的不同功能的能力。因此，我们对两种类型的概念进行建模——适合利用视觉属性进行对象识别的物质概念，以及适合利用基于语言的属性对物质概念进行分类的分类概念。本文的目标是证明对象识别可以被解释为通过视觉属性进行分类，这与主流计算机视觉中的工作不同。为此，我们提出了一种基于 Ranganathan 的四阶段分面知识组织过程的对象识别过程，该过程以物质概念和分类概念的目的语义区别为基础。我们还简要介绍了正在进行的 MultiMedia UKC 项目，其目的是按照我们提出的流程构建对象识别资源 本文旨在通过视觉属性将物体识别解释为分类过程，区别于主流计算机视觉方法。 Fausto Giunchiglia,Mayukh Bagchi cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Improving Ranking Quality and Fairness in Swiss-System Chess Tournaments
title_zh: 提高瑞士体系国际象棋锦标赛的排名质量和公平性
abstract: The International Chess Federation (FIDE) imposes a voluminous and complex set of player pairing criteria in Swiss-system chess tournaments and endorses computer programs that are able to calculate the prescribed pairings. The purpose of these formalities is to ensure that players are paired fairly during the tournament and that the final ranking corresponds to the players' true strength order. We contest the official FIDE player pairing routine by presenting alternative pairing rules. These can be enforced by computing maximum weight matchings in a carefully designed graph. We demonstrate by extensive experiments that a tournament format using our mechanism 1) yields fairer pairings in the rounds of the tournament and 2) produces a final ranking that reflects the players' true strengths better than the state-of-the-art FIDE pairing system.
summary: The International Chess Federation (FIDE) imposes a voluminous and complex set of player pairing criteria in Swiss-system chess tournaments and endorses computer programs that are able to calculate the prescribed pairings. The purpose of these formalities is to ensure that players are paired fairly during the tournament and that the final ranking corresponds to the players' true strength order. We contest the official FIDE player pairing routine by presenting alternative pairing rules. These can be enforced by computing maximum weight matchings in a carefully designed graph. We demonstrate by extensive experiments that a tournament format using our mechanism 1) yields fairer pairings in the rounds of the tournament and 2) produces a final ranking that reflects the players' true strengths better than the state-of-the-art FIDE pairing system.
abstract_zh: 国际象棋联合会（FIDE）在瑞士体系国际象棋锦标赛中规定了一套大量且复杂的棋手配对标准，并认可能够计算规定配对的计算机程序。这些手续的目的是确保选手在比赛期间公平配对，并确保最终排名符合选手的真实实力顺序。我们通过提出替代配对规则来对抗官方国际棋联选手配对程序。这些可以通过在精心设计的图中计算最大权重匹配来强制执行。我们通过大量的实验证明，使用我们的机制的锦标赛格式 1) 在锦标赛各轮中产生更公平的配对，2) 产生的最终排名比最先进的 FIDE 配对系统更好地反映了选手的真实实力。

AI.tldr: 改进瑞士制国际象棋比赛的配对规则以提高排名公平性和准确性
AI.motivation: FIDE的现有配对规则复杂且可能不够公平，需优化以确保更公平的配对和更准确的排名
AI.method: 通过构建特定图结构并计算最大权匹配来生成替代配对规则
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法在配对公平性和最终排名准确性上优于FIDE现有系统
AI.conclusion: 提出的新配对机制能有效提升瑞士制比赛的公平性与排名准确性，具有实际应用价值

authors_text: Zhihai Wang,Jie Wang,Qi Zhou,Bin Li,Houqiang Li
title: Sample-Efficient Reinforcement Learning via Conservative Model-Based Actor-Critic
title_zh: 通过基于保守模型的 Actor-Critic 进行样本高效的强化学习
abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning algorithms, which aim to learn a model of the environment to make decisions, are more sample efficient than their model-free counterparts. The sample efficiency of model-based approaches relies on whether the model can well approximate the environment. However, learning an accurate model is challenging, especially in complex and noisy environments. To tackle this problem, we propose the conservative model-based actor-critic (CMBAC), a novel approach that achieves high sample efficiency without the strong reliance on accurate learned models. Specifically, CMBAC learns multiple estimates of the Q-value function from a set of inaccurate models and uses the average of the bottom-k estimates -- a conservative estimate -- to optimize the policy. An appealing feature of CMBAC is that the conservative estimates effectively encourage the agent to avoid unreliable "promising actions" -- whose values are high in only a small fraction of the models. Experiments demonstrate that CMBAC significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in terms of sample efficiency on several challenging tasks, and the proposed method is more robust than previous methods in noisy environments.
summary: Model-based reinforcement learning algorithms, which aim to learn a model of the environment to make decisions, are more sample efficient than their model-free counterparts. The sample efficiency of model-based approaches relies on whether the model can well approximate the environment. However, learning an accurate model is challenging, especially in complex and noisy environments. To tackle this problem, we propose the conservative model-based actor-critic (CMBAC), a novel approach that achieves high sample efficiency without the strong reliance on accurate learned models. Specifically, CMBAC learns multiple estimates of the Q-value function from a set of inaccurate models and uses the average of the bottom-k estimates -- a conservative estimate -- to optimize the policy. An appealing feature of CMBAC is that the conservative estimates effectively encourage the agent to avoid unreliable "promising actions" -- whose values are high in only a small fraction of the models. Experiments demonstrate that CMBAC significantly outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in terms of sample efficiency on several challenging tasks, and the proposed method is more robust than previous methods in noisy environments.
abstract_zh: 基于模型的强化学习算法旨在学习环境模型以做出决策，比无模型的算法具有更高的样本效率。基于模型的方法的样本效率取决于模型是否能够很好地逼近环境。然而，学习准确的模型具有挑战性，尤其是在复杂和嘈杂的环境中。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了基于保守模型的演员批评家（CMBAC），这是一种新颖的方法，可以实现高样本效率，而无需强烈依赖准确的学习模型。具体来说，CMBAC 从一组不准确的模型中学习 Q 值函数的多个估计，并使用底部 k 估计的平均值（保守估计）来优化策略。 CMBAC 的一个吸引人的特点是，保守的估计有效地鼓励代理避免不可靠的“有希望的行动”——这些行动的价值仅在一小部分模型中很高。实验表明，CMBAC 在几个具有挑战性的任务中的样本效率方面显着优于最先进的方法，并且所提出的方法在噪声环境中比以前的方法更稳健。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CMBAC的保守模型基于演员评论家方法，旨在提高模型基于强化学习的样本效率。
AI.motivation: 传统模型基于方法依赖准确环境模型，但在复杂和嘈杂环境中学习精确模型具有挑战性，导致样本效率低下。
AI.method: CMBAC通过多个不准确模型学习Q值函数估计，并采用底部-k 估计的平均值（保守估计）优化策略，避免依赖单一模型的不可靠高价值动作。
AI.result: 实验表明，CMBAC在多个复杂任务中显著优于现有方法，在样本效率和噪声环境鲁棒性方面表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 保守估计策略有效缓解了模型不准确性问题，为复杂环境下的高效强化学习提供了新思路。

To tackle this problem, we propose the conservative model-based actor-critic (CMBAC), a novel approach that achieves high sample efficiency without the strong reliance on accurate learned models. title: Scale-Net: Learning to Reduce Scale Differences for Large-Scale Invariant Image Matching
title_zh: Scale-Net：学习减少大规模不变图像匹配的尺度差异
abstract: Most image matching methods perform poorly when encountering large scale changes in images. To solve this problem, firstly, we propose a scale-difference-aware image matching method (SDAIM) that reduces image scale differences before local feature extraction, via resizing both images of an image pair according to an estimated scale ratio. Secondly, in order to accurately estimate the scale ratio, we propose a covisibility-attention-reinforced matching module (CVARM) and then design a novel neural network, termed as Scale-Net, based on CVARM. The proposed CVARM can lay more stress on covisible areas within the image pair and suppress the distraction from those areas visible in only one image. Quantitative and qualitative experiments confirm that the proposed Scale-Net has higher scale ratio estimation accuracy and much better generalization ability compared with all the existing scale ratio estimation methods. Further experiments on image matching and relative pose estimation tasks demonstrate that our SDAIM and Scale-Net are able to greatly boost the performance of representative local features and state-of-the-art local feature matching methods.
summary: Most image matching methods perform poorly when encountering large scale changes in images. To solve this problem, firstly, we propose a scale-difference-aware image matching method (SDAIM) that reduces image scale differences before local feature extraction, via resizing both images of an image pair according to an estimated scale ratio. Secondly, in order to accurately estimate the scale ratio, we propose a covisibility-attention-reinforced matching module (CVARM) and then design a novel neural network, termed as Scale-Net, based on CVARM. The proposed CVARM can lay more stress on covisible areas within the image pair and suppress the distraction from those areas visible in only one image. Quantitative and qualitative experiments confirm that the proposed Scale-Net has higher scale ratio estimation accuracy and much better generalization ability compared with all the existing scale ratio estimation methods. Further experiments on image matching and relative pose estimation tasks demonstrate that our SDAIM and Scale-Net are able to greatly boost the performance of representative local features and state-of-the-art local feature matching methods.
abstract_zh: 当遇到图像的大规模变化时，大多数图像匹配方法表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，首先，我们提出了一种尺度差异感知图像匹配方法（SDAIM），该方法通过根据估计的比例比例调整图像对的两个图像的大小，在局部特征提取之前减少图像尺度差异。其次，为了准确估计尺度比，我们提出了一种协同视觉注意增强匹配模块（CVARM），然后基于CVARM设计了一种新颖的神经网络，称为Scale-Net。所提出的 CVARM 可以对图像对中的可见区域施加更多压力，并抑制对仅在一张图像中可见的区域的干扰。定量和定性实验证实，与所有现有的尺度比估计方法相比，所提出的Scale-Net具有更高的尺度比估计精度和更好的泛化能力。关于图像匹配和相对姿态估计任务的进一步实验表明，我们的 SDAIM 和 Scale-Net 能够极大地提高代表性局部特征和最先进的局部特征匹配方法的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Scale-Net方法，通过减少图像尺度差异提升大尺度不变图像匹配性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图像匹配方法在面对大尺度变化时表现不佳，需解决尺度差异导致的匹配失败问题。
AI.method: 提出尺度差异感知匹配方法(SDAIM)和协可见性注意力强化模块(CVARM)，设计Scale-Net网络实现尺度比例估计。
AI.result: 实验表明Scale-Net在尺度估计精度和泛化能力上优于现有方法，显著提升特征匹配和相对位姿估计性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过学习尺度差异补偿机制，有效解决了大尺度变化下的图像匹配难题。

search_text: Scale-Net: Learning to Reduce Scale Differences for Large-Scale Invariant Image Matching Scale-Net：学习减少大规模不变图像匹配的尺度差异 Most image matching methods perform poorly when encountering large scale changes in images. To solve this problem, firstly, we propose a scale-difference-aware image matching method (SDAIM) that reduces image scale differences before local feature extraction, via resizing both images of an image pair according to an estimated scale ratio. Secondly, in order to accurately estimate the scale ratio, we propose a covisibility-attention-reinforced matching module (CVARM) and then design a novel neural network, termed as Scale-Net, based on CVARM. The proposed CVARM can lay more stress on covisible areas within the image pair and suppress the distraction from those areas visible in only one image. Quantitative and qualitative experiments confirm that the proposed Scale-Net has higher scale ratio estimation accuracy and much better generalization ability compared with all the existing scale ratio estimation methods. Further experiments on image matching and relative pose estimation tasks demonstrate that our SDAIM and Scale-Net are able to greatly boost the performance of representative local features and state-of-the-art local feature matching methods. 当遇到图像的大规模变化时，大多数图像匹配方法表现不佳。为了解决这个问题，首先，我们提出了一种尺度差异感知图像匹配方法（SDAIM），该方法通过根据估计的比例比例调整图像对的两个图像的大小，在局部特征提取之前减少图像尺度差异。其次，为了准确估计尺度比，我们提出了一种协同视觉注意增强匹配模块（CVARM），然后基于CVARM设计了一种新颖的神经网络，称为Scale-Net。所提出的 CVARM 可以对图像对中的可见区域施加更多压力，并抑制对仅在一张图像中可见的区域的干扰。定量和定性实验证实，与所有现有的尺度比估计方法相比，所提出的Scale-Net具有更高的尺度比估计精度和更好的泛化能力。关于图像匹配和相对姿态估计任务的进一步实验表明，我们的 SDAIM 和 Scale-Net 能够极大地提高代表性局部特征和最先进的局部特征匹配方法的性能。 本文提出Scale-Net方法，通过减少图像尺度差异提升大尺度不变图像匹配性能。 Yujie Fu,Yihong Wu cs.CV

authors_text: Muhammad Saad Saeed,Muhammad Haris Khan,Shah Nawaz,Muhammad Haroon Yousaf,Alessio Del Bue
title: Fusion and Orthogonal Projection for Improved Face-Voice Association
title_zh: 用于改进面部语音关联的融合和正交投影
abstract: We study the problem of learning association between face and voice, which is gaining interest in the computer vision community lately. Prior works adopt pairwise or triplet loss formulations to learn an embedding space amenable for associated matching and verification tasks. Albeit showing some progress, such loss formulations are, however, restrictive due to dependency on distance-dependent margin parameter, poor run-time training complexity, and reliance on carefully crafted negative mining procedures. In this work, we hypothesize that enriched feature representation coupled with an effective yet efficient supervision is necessary in realizing a discriminative joint embedding space for improved face-voice association. To this end, we propose a light-weight, plug-and-play mechanism that exploits the complementary cues in both modalities to form enriched fused embeddings and clusters them based on their identity labels via orthogonality constraints. We coin our proposed mechanism as fusion and orthogonal projection (FOP) and instantiate in a two-stream pipeline. The overall resulting framework is evaluated on a large-scale VoxCeleb dataset with a multitude of tasks, including cross-modal verification and matching. Results show that our method performs favourably against the current state-of-the-art methods and our proposed supervision formulation is more effective and efficient than the ones employed by the contemporary methods.
summary: We study the problem of learning association between face and voice, which is gaining interest in the computer vision community lately. Prior works adopt pairwise or triplet loss formulations to learn an embedding space amenable for associated matching and verification tasks. Albeit showing some progress, such loss formulations are, however, restrictive due to dependency on distance-dependent margin parameter, poor run-time training complexity, and reliance on carefully crafted negative mining procedures. In this work, we hypothesize that enriched feature representation coupled with an effective yet efficient supervision is necessary in realizing a discriminative joint embedding space for improved face-voice association. To this end, we propose a light-weight, plug-and-play mechanism that exploits the complementary cues in both modalities to form enriched fused embeddings and clusters them based on their identity labels via orthogonality constraints. We coin our proposed mechanism as fusion and orthogonal projection (FOP) and instantiate in a two-stream pipeline. The overall resulting framework is evaluated on a large-scale VoxCeleb dataset with a multitude of tasks, including cross-modal verification and matching. Results show that our method performs favourably against the current state-of-the-art methods and our proposed supervision formulation is more effective and efficient than the ones employed by the contemporary methods.
abstract_zh: 我们研究面部和声音之间的学习关联问题，该问题最近引起了计算机视觉界的兴趣。先前的工作采用成对或三元组损失公式来学习适合相关匹配和验证任务的嵌入空间。尽管取得了一些进展，但由于依赖于距离相关的裕度参数、较差的运行时训练复杂性以及对精心设计的负挖掘程序的依赖，这种损失公式具有限制性。在这项工作中，我们假设丰富的特征表示加上有效而高效的监督对于实现有区别的联合嵌入空间以改善面部语音关联是必要的。为此，我们提出了一种轻量级、即插即用的机制，利用两种模式中的互补线索来形成丰富的融合嵌入，并通过正交性约束根据其身份标签对它们进行聚类。我们将提出的机制称为融合和正交投影（FOP），并在双流管道中实例化。总体结果框架在大规模 VoxCeleb 数据集上进行评估，其中包含多种任务，包括跨模式验证和匹配。结果表明，我们的方法优于当前最先进的方法，并且我们提出的监督公式比当代方法所采用的监督公式更加有效和高效。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合与正交投影（FOP）机制，通过结合人脸与语音的互补信息并利用正交约束进行聚类，改进跨模态关联效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖距离相关边距参数、训练复杂度高且依赖人工负样本挖掘，难以有效学习判别性联合嵌入空间。
AI.method: 设计轻量级双流框架，融合多模态特征并基于身份标签施加正交约束，形成聚类结构以提升关联性能。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb数据集上，跨模态验证与匹配任务中优于现有最先进方法，且监督策略更高效。
AI.conclusion: FOP机制通过特征融合与正交约束有效提升了人脸-语音关联性能，验证了方法的优越性与效率。

title: ScanQA: 3D Question Answering for Spatial Scene Understanding
title_zh: ScanQA：用于空间场景理解的 3D 问答
comment: CVPR2022. The first three authors are equally contributed. Project page: https://github.com/ATR-DBI/ScanQA
comments: CVPR2022. The first three authors are equally contributed. Project page: https://github.com/ATR-DBI/ScanQA
abstract: We propose a new 3D spatial understanding task of 3D Question Answering (3D-QA). In the 3D-QA task, models receive visual information from the entire 3D scene of the rich RGB-D indoor scan and answer the given textual questions about the 3D scene. Unlike the 2D-question answering of VQA, the conventional 2D-QA models suffer from problems with spatial understanding of object alignment and directions and fail the object identification from the textual questions in 3D-QA. We propose a baseline model for 3D-QA, named ScanQA model, where the model learns a fused descriptor from 3D object proposals and encoded sentence embeddings. This learned descriptor correlates the language expressions with the underlying geometric features of the 3D scan and facilitates the regression of 3D bounding boxes to determine described objects in textual questions and outputs correct answers. We collected human-edited question-answer pairs with free-form answers that are grounded to 3D objects in each 3D scene. Our new ScanQA dataset contains over 40K question-answer pairs from the 800 indoor scenes drawn from the ScanNet dataset. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed 3D-QA task is the first large-scale effort to perform object-grounded question-answering in 3D environments.
summary: We propose a new 3D spatial understanding task of 3D Question Answering (3D-QA). In the 3D-QA task, models receive visual information from the entire 3D scene of the rich RGB-D indoor scan and answer the given textual questions about the 3D scene. Unlike the 2D-question answering of VQA, the conventional 2D-QA models suffer from problems with spatial understanding of object alignment and directions and fail the object identification from the textual questions in 3D-QA. We propose a baseline model for 3D-QA, named ScanQA model, where the model learns a fused descriptor from 3D object proposals and encoded sentence embeddings. This learned descriptor correlates the language expressions with the underlying geometric features of the 3D scan and facilitates the regression of 3D bounding boxes to determine described objects in textual questions and outputs correct answers. We collected human-edited question-answer pairs with free-form answers that are grounded to 3D objects in each 3D scene. Our new ScanQA dataset contains over 40K question-answer pairs from the 800 indoor scenes drawn from the ScanNet dataset. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed 3D-QA task is the first large-scale effort to perform object-grounded question-answering in 3D environments.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的 3D 空间理解任务 3D 问答（3D-QA）。在 3D-QA 任务中，模型从丰富的 RGB-D 室内扫描的整个 3D 场景接收视觉信息，并回答有关 3D 场景的给定文本问题。与 VQA 的 2D 问答不同，传统的 2D-QA 模型存在对象对齐和方向的空间理解问题，并且无法从 3D-QA 中的文本问题中识别对象。我们提出了一个 3D-QA 基线模型，名为 ScanQA 模型，该模型从 3D 对象提案和编码句子嵌入中学习融合描述符。这种学习到的描述符将语言表达与 3D 扫描的基础几何特征相关联，并促进 3D 边界框的回归，以确定文本问题中的描述对象并输出正确答案。我们收集了人工编辑的问题答案对以及基于每个 3D 场景中的 3D 对象的自由形式答案。我们的新 ScanQA 数据集包含来自 ScanNet 数据集的 800 个室内场景的超过 40K 个问答对。据我们所知，所提出的 3D-QA 任务是在 3D 环境中执行基于对象的问答的第一个大规模工作。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种新的3D空间理解任务——3D问答（3D-QA），通过分析RGB-D室内扫描数据中的3D场景，回答关于场景的文本问题。
AI.motivation: 传统2D问答模型在处理3D场景中的空间关系和物体识别时存在局限性，无法有效应对基于文本的3D问题，因此需要开发专门针对3D环境的问答任务和方法。
AI.method: 提出ScanQA基线模型，通过融合3D物体候选区域和句子嵌入生成联合描述符，将语言表达与3D几何特征关联，实现3D边界框回归以定位文本描述的物体并输出答案。同时构建包含40K问题-答案对的ScanQA数据集。
AI.result: 首次在大规模3D环境中实现基于物体的问答任务，验证了ScanQA模型在空间推理和物体定位方面的有效性，数据集涵盖800个ScanNet室内场景。
AI.conclusion: ScanQA任务和数据集为3D空间理解提供了新方向，展示了语言与几何特征融合在3D问答中的潜力，为后续研究奠定了基础。

motivation: 传统2D问答模型在处理3D场景中的空间关系和物体识别时存在局限性，无法有效应对基于文本的3D问题，因此需要开发专门针对3D环境的问答任务和方法。
method: 提出ScanQA基线模型，通过融合3D物体候选区域和句子嵌入生成联合描述符，将语言表达与3D几何特征关联，实现3D边界框回归以定位文本描述的物体并输出答案。同时构建包含40K问题-答案对的ScanQA数据集。
result: 首次在大规模3D环境中实现基于物体的问答任务，验证了ScanQA模型在空间推理和物体定位方面的有效性，数据集涵盖800个ScanNet室内场景。
conclusion: ScanQA任务和数据集为3D空间理解提供了新方向，展示了语言与几何特征融合在3D问答中的潜力，为后续研究奠定了基础。
search_text: ScanQA: 3D Question Answering for Spatial Scene Understanding ScanQA：用于空间场景理解的 3D 问答 We propose a new 3D spatial understanding task of 3D Question Answering (3D-QA). In the 3D-QA task, models receive visual information from the entire 3D scene of the rich RGB-D indoor scan and answer the given textual questions about the 3D scene. Unlike the 2D-question answering of VQA, the conventional 2D-QA models suffer from problems with spatial understanding of object alignment and directions and fail the object identification from the textual questions in 3D-QA. We propose a baseline model for 3D-QA, named ScanQA model, where the model learns a fused descriptor from 3D object proposals and encoded sentence embeddings. This learned descriptor correlates the language expressions with the underlying geometric features of the 3D scan and facilitates the regression of 3D bounding boxes to determine described objects in textual questions and outputs correct answers. We collected human-edited question-answer pairs with free-form answers that are grounded to 3D objects in each 3D scene. Our new ScanQA dataset contains over 40K question-answer pairs from the 800 indoor scenes drawn from the ScanNet dataset. To the best of our knowledge, the proposed 3D-QA task is the first large-scale effort to perform object-grounded question-answering in 3D environments. 我们提出了一种新的 3D 空间理解任务 3D 问答（3D-QA）。在 3D-QA 任务中，模型从丰富的 RGB-D 室内扫描的整个 3D 场景接收视觉信息，并回答有关 3D 场景的给定文本问题。与 VQA 的 2D 问答不同，传统的 2D-QA 模型存在对象对齐和方向的空间理解问题，并且无法从 3D-QA 中的文本问题中识别对象。我们提出了一个 3D-QA 基线模型，名为 ScanQA 模型，该模型从 3D 对象提案和编码句子嵌入中学习融合描述符。这种学习到的描述符将语言表达与 3D 扫描的基础几何特征相关联，并促进 3D 边界框的回归，以确定文本问题中的描述对象并输出正确答案。我们收集了人工编辑的问题答案对以及基于每个 3D 场景中的 3D 对象的自由形式答案。我们的新 ScanQA 数据集包含来自 ScanNet 数据集的 800 个室内场景的超过 40K 个问答对。据我们所知，所提出的 3D-QA 任务是在 3D 环境中执行基于对象的问答的第一个大规模工作。 本文提出了一种新的3D空间理解任务——3D问答（3D-QA），通过分析RGB-D室内扫描数据中的3D场景，回答关于场景的文本问题。 Daichi Azuma,Taiki Miyanishi,Shuhei Kurita,Motoaki Kawanabe cs.CV

title: a novel attention-based network for fast salient object detection
title_zh: 一种新颖的基于注意力的网络，用于快速显着目标检测
abstract: In the current salient object detection network, the most popular method is using U-shape structure. However, the massive number of parameters leads to more consumption of computing and storage resources which are not feasible to deploy on the limited memory device. Some others shallow layer network will not maintain the same accuracy compared with U-shape structure and the deep network structure with more parameters will not converge to a global minimum loss with great speed. To overcome all of these disadvantages, we proposed a new deep convolution network architecture with three contributions: (1) using smaller convolution neural networks (CNNs) to compress the model in our improved salient object features compression and reinforcement extraction module (ISFCREM) to reduce parameters of the model. (2) introducing channel attention mechanism in ISFCREM to weigh different channels for improving the ability of feature representation. (3) applying a new optimizer to accumulate the long-term gradient information during training to adaptively tune the learning rate. The results demonstrate that the proposed method can compress the model to 1/3 of the original size nearly without losing the accuracy and converging faster and more smoothly on six widely used datasets of salient object detection compared with the others models. Our code is published in https://gitee.com/binzhangbinzhangbin/code-a-novel-attention-based-network-for-fast-salient-object-detection.git
summary: In the current salient object detection network, the most popular method is using U-shape structure. However, the massive number of parameters leads to more consumption of computing and storage resources which are not feasible to deploy on the limited memory device. Some others shallow layer network will not maintain the same accuracy compared with U-shape structure and the deep network structure with more parameters will not converge to a global minimum loss with great speed. To overcome all of these disadvantages, we proposed a new deep convolution network architecture with three contributions: (1) using smaller convolution neural networks (CNNs) to compress the model in our improved salient object features compression and reinforcement extraction module (ISFCREM) to reduce parameters of the model. (2) introducing channel attention mechanism in ISFCREM to weigh different channels for improving the ability of feature representation. (3) applying a new optimizer to accumulate the long-term gradient information during training to adaptively tune the learning rate. The results demonstrate that the proposed method can compress the model to 1/3 of the original size nearly without losing the accuracy and converging faster and more smoothly on six widely used datasets of salient object detection compared with the others models. Our code is published in https://gitee.com/binzhangbinzhangbin/code-a-novel-attention-based-network-for-fast-salient-object-detection.git
abstract_zh: 在当前的显着目标检测网络中，最流行的方法是使用U形结构。然而，大量的参数导致计算和存储资源的消耗更多，这在有限的存储设备上部署是不可行的。其他一些浅层网络与U型结构相比将无法保持相同的精度，并且具有更多参数的深层网络结构将无法快速收敛到全局最小损失。为了克服所有这些缺点，我们提出了一种新的深度卷积网络架构，具有以下三个贡献：（1）在改进的显着对象特征压缩和强化提取模块（ISFCREM）中使用更小的卷积神经网络（CNN）来压缩模型，以减少模型的参数。 (2)在ISFCREM中引入通道注意力机制来权衡不同通道以提高特征表示能力。 （3）应用新的优化器在训练过程中积累长期梯度信息，以自适应地调整学习率。结果表明，与其他模型相比，该方法可以将模型压缩到原始大小的 1/3，几乎不会损失精度，并且在 6 个广泛使用的显着目标检测数据集上收敛得更快、更平滑。我们的代码发布在 https://gitee.com/binzhangbinzhangbin/code-a-novel-attention-based-network-for-fast-salient-object-detection.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的新型深度卷积网络，用于解决显著物体检测中的模型参数过多、计算资源消耗大及收敛速度慢的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有U型结构网络参数量大导致资源消耗高，浅层网络精度不足，深层网络收敛速度慢，需设计更高效且准确的模型架构。
AI.method: 提出改进的显著物体特征压缩与强化提取模块（ISFCREM），包含：1) 小型CNN压缩模型参数；2) 通道注意力机制优化特征表示；3) 新优化器累积长期梯度信息以自适应调整学习率。
AI.result: 模型体积压缩至原大小的1/3且精度几乎无损失，在六个常用数据集上收敛速度更快更稳定。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在保持检测精度的同时显著降低计算资源消耗，适用于内存受限设备的实时显著物体检测场景。
