authors_text: Zhiyong Huang,Kekai Sheng,Ke Li,Jian Liang,Taiping Yao,Weiming Dong,Dengwen Zhou,Xing Sun
title: Reciprocal Normalization for Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 领域适应的倒数归一化
comment: The best feature normalization module for domain adaptation
comments: The best feature normalization module for domain adaptation
abstract: Batch normalization (BN) is widely used in modern deep neural networks, which has been shown to represent the domain-related knowledge, and thus is ineffective for cross-domain tasks like unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). Existing BN variant methods aggregate source and target domain knowledge in the same channel in normalization module. However, the misalignment between the features of corresponding channels across domains often leads to a sub-optimal transferability. In this paper, we exploit the cross-domain relation and propose a novel normalization method, Reciprocal Normalization (RN). Specifically, RN first presents a Reciprocal Compensation (RC) module to acquire the compensatory for each channel in both domains based on the cross-domain channel-wise correlation. Then RN develops a Reciprocal Aggregation (RA) module to adaptively aggregate the feature with its cross-domain compensatory components. As an alternative to BN, RN is more suitable for UDA problems and can be easily integrated into popular domain adaptation methods. Experiments show that the proposed RN outperforms existing normalization counterparts by a large margin and helps state-of-the-art adaptation approaches achieve better results. The source code is available on https://github.com/Openning07/reciprocal-normalization-for-DA.
summary: Batch normalization (BN) is widely used in modern deep neural networks, which has been shown to represent the domain-related knowledge, and thus is ineffective for cross-domain tasks like unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). Existing BN variant methods aggregate source and target domain knowledge in the same channel in normalization module. However, the misalignment between the features of corresponding channels across domains often leads to a sub-optimal transferability. In this paper, we exploit the cross-domain relation and propose a novel normalization method, Reciprocal Normalization (RN). Specifically, RN first presents a Reciprocal Compensation (RC) module to acquire the compensatory for each channel in both domains based on the cross-domain channel-wise correlation. Then RN develops a Reciprocal Aggregation (RA) module to adaptively aggregate the feature with its cross-domain compensatory components. As an alternative to BN, RN is more suitable for UDA problems and can be easily integrated into popular domain adaptation methods. Experiments show that the proposed RN outperforms existing normalization counterparts by a large margin and helps state-of-the-art adaptation approaches achieve better results. The source code is available on https://github.com/Openning07/reciprocal-normalization-for-DA.
abstract_zh: 批量归一化（BN）广泛应用于现代深度神经网络中，已被证明可以表示领域相关的知识，因此对于无监督领域适应（UDA）等跨领域任务无效。现有的 BN 变体方法在归一化模块的同一通道中聚合源和目标领域知识。然而，跨域的相应通道的特征之间的不对准通常会导致次优的可转移性。在本文中，我们利用跨域关系并提出了一种新的归一化方法，即倒数归一化（RN）。具体来说，RN首先提出了一个倒数补偿（RC）模块，以基于跨域通道相关性来获取两个域中每个通道的补偿。然后RN开发了一个互惠聚合（RA）模块来自适应地聚合特征及其跨域补偿组件。作为 BN 的替代方案，RN 更适合 UDA 问题，并且可以轻松集成到流行的领域自适应方法中。实验表明，所提出的 RN 大大优于现有的标准化对应方案，并有助于最先进的适应方法取得更好的结果。源代码可在 https://github.com/Openning07/reciprocal-normalization-for-DA 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Reciprocal Normalization (RN)的新归一化方法，以解决无监督域适应（UDA）中跨域特征不对齐导致的迁移效果不佳问题。
AI.motivation: 传统批量归一化（BN）在跨域任务中因源域和目标域特征通道对齐不足而效果受限，现有BN变体方法未能有效处理跨域特征补偿问题。
AI.method: 设计包含Reciprocal Compensation（RC）模块和Reciprocal Aggregation（RA）模块的RN方法：RC模块基于跨域通道相关性计算补偿量，RA模块自适应聚合补偿特征与原始特征。
AI.result: 实验表明RN在多个UDA基准数据集上显著优于现有归一化方法，并提升主流域适应算法的性能表现。
AI.conclusion: RN通过建模跨域特征补偿关系有效解决了域间特征不对齐问题，为UDA任务提供了更优的归一化方案。

search_text: Reciprocal Normalization for Domain Adaptation 领域适应的倒数归一化 Batch normalization (BN) is widely used in modern deep neural networks, which has been shown to represent the domain-related knowledge, and thus is ineffective for cross-domain tasks like unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). However, the misalignment between the features of corresponding channels across domains often leads to a sub-optimal transferability. In this paper, we exploit the cross-domain relation and propose a novel normalization method, Reciprocal Normalization (RN). Specifically, RN first presents a Reciprocal Compensation (RC) module to acquire the compensatory for each channel in both domains based on the cross-domain channel-wise correlation. Then RN develops a Reciprocal Aggregation (RA) module to adaptively aggregate the feature with its cross-domain compensatory components. As an alternative to BN, RN is more suitable for UDA problems and can be easily integrated into popular domain adaptation methods. Experiments show that the proposed RN outperforms existing normalization counterparts by a large margin and helps state-of-the-art adaptation approaches achieve better results. The source code is available on https://github.com/Openning07/reciprocal-normalization-for-DA. 批量归一化（BN）广泛应用于现代深度神经网络中，已被证明可以表示领域相关的知识，因此对于无监督领域适应（UDA）等跨领域任务无效。现有的 BN 变体方法在归一化模块的同一通道中聚合源和目标领域知识。然而，跨域的相应通道的特征之间的不对准通常会导致次优的可转移性。在本文中，我们利用跨域关系并提出了一种新的归一化方法，即倒数归一化（RN）。具体来说，RN首先提出了一个倒数补偿（RC）模块，以基于跨域通道相关性来获取两个域中每个通道的补偿。然后RN开发了一个互惠聚合（RA）模块来自适应地聚合特征及其跨域补偿组件。作为 BN 的替代方案，RN 更适合 UDA 问题，并且可以轻松集成到流行的领域自适应方法中。实验表明，所提出的 RN 大大优于现有的标准化对应方案，并有助于最先进的适应方法取得更好的结果。源代码可在 https://github.com/Openning07/reciprocal-normalization-for-DA 上获取。 本文提出一种名为Reciprocal Normalization (RN)的新归一化方法，以解决无监督域适应（UDA）中跨域特征不对齐导致的迁移效果不佳问题。 Zhiyong Huang,Kekai Sheng,Ke Li,Jian Liang,Taiping Yao,Weiming Dong,Dengwen Zhou,Xing Sun cs.CV

title: Safe multi-agent deep reinforcement learning for joint bidding and maintenance scheduling of generation units
title_zh: 用于发电机组联合招标和检修调度的安全多智能体深度强化学习
abstract: This paper proposes a safe reinforcement learning algorithm for generation bidding decisions and unit maintenance scheduling in a competitive electricity market environment. In this problem, each unit aims to find a bidding strategy that maximizes its revenue while concurrently retaining its reliability by scheduling preventive maintenance. The maintenance scheduling provides some safety constraints which should be satisfied at all times. Satisfying the critical safety and reliability constraints while the generation units have an incomplete information of each others' bidding strategy is a challenging problem. Bi-level optimization and reinforcement learning are state of the art approaches for solving this type of problems. However, neither bi-level optimization nor reinforcement learning can handle the challenges of incomplete information and critical safety constraints. To tackle these challenges, we propose the safe deep deterministic policy gradient reinforcement learning algorithm which is based on a combination of reinforcement learning and a predicted safety filter. The case study demonstrates that the proposed approach can achieve a higher profit compared to other state of the art methods while concurrently satisfying the system safety constraints.
summary: This paper proposes a safe reinforcement learning algorithm for generation bidding decisions and unit maintenance scheduling in a competitive electricity market environment. In this problem, each unit aims to find a bidding strategy that maximizes its revenue while concurrently retaining its reliability by scheduling preventive maintenance. The maintenance scheduling provides some safety constraints which should be satisfied at all times. Satisfying the critical safety and reliability constraints while the generation units have an incomplete information of each others' bidding strategy is a challenging problem. Bi-level optimization and reinforcement learning are state of the art approaches for solving this type of problems. However, neither bi-level optimization nor reinforcement learning can handle the challenges of incomplete information and critical safety constraints. To tackle these challenges, we propose the safe deep deterministic policy gradient reinforcement learning algorithm which is based on a combination of reinforcement learning and a predicted safety filter. The case study demonstrates that the proposed approach can achieve a higher profit compared to other state of the art methods while concurrently satisfying the system safety constraints.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种在竞争性电力市场环境下用于发电竞价决策和机组维护调度的安全强化学习算法。在这个问题中，每个单位的目标是找到一种投标策略，使其收入最大化，同时通过安排预防性维护来保持其可靠性。维护计划提供了一些应始终满足的安全约束。在发电机组彼此的投标策略信息不完整的情况下满足关键的安全性和可靠性约束是一个具有挑战性的问题。双层优化和强化学习是解决此类问题的最先进方法。然而，双层优化和强化学习都无法应对不完整信息和关键安全约束的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了安全深度确定性策略梯度强化学习算法，该算法基于强化学习和预测安全过滤器的组合。案例研究表明，与其他最先进的方法相比，所提出的方法可以实现更高的利润，同时满足系统安全约束。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种安全的深度强化学习算法，用于在竞争性电力市场环境中实现发电单元的联合竞价和维护调度。
AI.motivation: 在电力市场中，发电单元需在最大化收益的同时通过预防性维护保持可靠性，但现有方法难以处理不完全信息和关键安全约束的挑战。
AI.method: 结合强化学习与预测安全过滤器，提出安全深度确定性策略梯度算法，以满足系统安全约束并处理不完全信息问题。
AI.result: 案例研究表明，该方法在保证系统安全约束的同时，相比其他先进方法能实现更高的利润。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了收益最大化与安全性要求，在电力市场竞价与维护调度问题中具有优势。

title: Image Animation with Keypoint Mask
title_zh: 具有关键点蒙版的图像动画
abstract: Motion transfer is the task of synthesizing future video frames of a single source image according to the motion from a given driving video. In order to solve it, we face the challenging complexity of motion representation and the unknown relations between the driving video and the source image. Despite its difficulty, this problem attracted great interests from researches at the recent years, with gradual improvements. The goal is often thought as the decoupling of motion and appearance, which is may be solved by extracting the motion from keypoint movement. We chose to tackle the generic, unsupervised setting, where we need to apply animation to any arbitrary object, without any domain specific model for the structure of the input. In this work, we extract the structure from a keypoint heatmap, without an explicit motion representation. Then, the structures from the image and the video are extracted to warp the image according to the video, by a deep generator. We suggest two variants of the structure from different steps in the keypoint module, and show superior qualitative pose and quantitative scores.
summary: Motion transfer is the task of synthesizing future video frames of a single source image according to the motion from a given driving video. In order to solve it, we face the challenging complexity of motion representation and the unknown relations between the driving video and the source image. Despite its difficulty, this problem attracted great interests from researches at the recent years, with gradual improvements. The goal is often thought as the decoupling of motion and appearance, which is may be solved by extracting the motion from keypoint movement. We chose to tackle the generic, unsupervised setting, where we need to apply animation to any arbitrary object, without any domain specific model for the structure of the input. In this work, we extract the structure from a keypoint heatmap, without an explicit motion representation. Then, the structures from the image and the video are extracted to warp the image according to the video, by a deep generator. We suggest two variants of the structure from different steps in the keypoint module, and show superior qualitative pose and quantitative scores.
abstract_zh: 运动传输是根据给定驾驶视频的运动合成单个源图像的未来视频帧的任务。为了解决这个问题，我们面临着运动表示的挑战性复杂性以及驾驶视频和源图像之间的未知关系。尽管这个问题很困难，但近年来引起了研究的极大兴趣，并逐渐得到改进。目标通常被认为是运动和外观的解耦，这可以通过从关键点运动中提取运动来解决。我们选择处理通用的、无监督的设置，在这种设置中，我们需要将动画应用到任何任意对象，而不需要任何针对输入结构的特定领域模型。在这项工作中，我们从关键点热图中提取结构，没有明确的运动表示。然后，通过深度生成器提取图像和视频中的结构，以根据视频扭曲图像。我们从关键点模块的不同步骤中提出了两种结构变体，并显示出优异的定性姿势和定量分数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督方法，通过关键点热图提取结构信息，将源图像根据驱动视频进行动画化生成。
AI.motivation: 运动迁移面临运动表示复杂性和源视频关联性未知的挑战，需在无特定领域模型的前提下实现通用动画生成。
AI.method: 从关键点热图中提取结构信息，利用深度生成器对齐图像与视频结构，提出两种关键点模块结构变体。
AI.result: 在姿态保持和定量指标上均优于现有方法，实现高质量无监督动画生成。
AI.conclusion: 关键点结构解耦方法有效解决了通用场景下的运动迁移问题，为无监督动画生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Sarah Ibrahimi,Arnaud Sors,Rafael Sampaio de Rezende,Stéphane Clinchant
title: Learning with Label Noise for Image Retrieval by Selecting Interactions
title_zh: 通过选择交互来学习标签噪声以进行图像检索
abstract: Learning with noisy labels is an active research area for image classification. However, the effect of noisy labels on image retrieval has been less studied. In this work, we propose a noise-resistant method for image retrieval named Teacher-based Selection of Interactions, T-SINT, which identifies noisy interactions, ie. elements in the distance matrix, and selects correct positive and negative interactions to be considered in the retrieval loss by using a teacher-based training setup which contributes to the stability. As a result, it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods on high noise rates across benchmark datasets with synthetic noise and more realistic noise.
summary: Learning with noisy labels is an active research area for image classification. However, the effect of noisy labels on image retrieval has been less studied. In this work, we propose a noise-resistant method for image retrieval named Teacher-based Selection of Interactions, T-SINT, which identifies noisy interactions, ie. elements in the distance matrix, and selects correct positive and negative interactions to be considered in the retrieval loss by using a teacher-based training setup which contributes to the stability. As a result, it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods on high noise rates across benchmark datasets with synthetic noise and more realistic noise.
abstract_zh: 使用噪声标签学习是图像分类的一个活跃研究领域。然而，噪声标签对图像检索的影响研究较少。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种抗噪声的图像检索方法，称为基于教师的交互选择，T-SINT，它可以识别噪声交互，即。距离矩阵中的元素，并通过使用有助于稳定性的基于教师的训练设置来选择正确的正向和负向交互作用以在检索损失中考虑。因此，它在具有合成噪声和更真实噪声的基准数据集上的高噪声率方面始终优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为T-SINT的抗标签噪声图像检索方法，通过教师训练框架筛选有效交互关系以提升检索性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要关注分类任务中的标签噪声问题，而图像检索在噪声标签下的鲁棒性研究不足，需开发更稳定的噪声处理机制。
AI.method: 基于教师-学生训练框架，通过分析距离矩阵中的交互元素，识别并剔除噪声干扰，选择可靠正负样本对构建检索损失函数。
AI.result: 在合成噪声和真实噪声数据集上，T-SINT在高噪声率场景下持续优于现有最先进方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过交互关系筛选机制，T-SINT有效缓解了标签噪声对图像检索的影响，为噪声环境下的检索任务提供了新思路。

search_text: Learning with Label Noise for Image Retrieval by Selecting Interactions 通过选择交互来学习标签噪声以进行图像检索 Learning with noisy labels is an active research area for image classification. However, the effect of noisy labels on image retrieval has been less studied. In this work, we propose a noise-resistant method for image retrieval named Teacher-based Selection of Interactions, T-SINT, which identifies noisy interactions, ie. elements in the distance matrix, and selects correct positive and negative interactions to be considered in the retrieval loss by using a teacher-based training setup which contributes to the stability. As a result, it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods on high noise rates across benchmark datasets with synthetic noise and more realistic noise. 使用噪声标签学习是图像分类的一个活跃研究领域。然而，噪声标签对图像检索的影响研究较少。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种抗噪声的图像检索方法，称为基于教师的交互选择，T-SINT，它可以识别噪声交互，即。距离矩阵中的元素，并通过使用有助于稳定性的基于教师的训练设置来选择正确的正向和负向交互作用以在检索损失中考虑。因此，它在具有合成噪声和更真实噪声的基准数据集上的高噪声率方面始终优于最先进的方法。 本文提出一种名为T-SINT的抗标签噪声图像检索方法，通过教师训练框架筛选有效交互关系以提升检索性能。 Sarah Ibrahimi,Arnaud Sors,Rafael Sampaio de Rezende,Stéphane Clinchant cs.CV

title: Prioritized Hierarchical Compliance Control for Dual-Arm Robot Stable Clamping
title_zh: 双臂机器人稳定夹持优先分级合规控制
comment: 7 pages, 7 figures, accepted by IEEE ROBIO 2021
comments: 7 pages, 7 figures, accepted by IEEE ROBIO 2021
abstract: When a dual-arm robot clamps a rigid object in an environment for human beings, the environment or the collaborating human will impose incidental disturbance on the operated object or the robot arm, leading to clamping failure, damaging the robot even hurting the human. This research proposes a prioritized hierarchical compliance control to simultaneously deal with the two types of disturbances in the dual-arm robot clamping. First, we use hierarchical quadratic programming (HQP) to solve the robot inverse kinematics under the joint constraints and prioritize the compliance for the disturbance on the object over that on the robot arm. Second, we estimate the disturbance forces throughout the momentum observer with the F/T sensors and adopt admittance control to realize the compliances. Finally, we perform the verify experiments on a 14-DOF position-controlled dual-arm robot WalkerX, clamping a rigid object stably while realizing the compliance against the disturbances.
summary: When a dual-arm robot clamps a rigid object in an environment for human beings, the environment or the collaborating human will impose incidental disturbance on the operated object or the robot arm, leading to clamping failure, damaging the robot even hurting the human. This research proposes a prioritized hierarchical compliance control to simultaneously deal with the two types of disturbances in the dual-arm robot clamping. First, we use hierarchical quadratic programming (HQP) to solve the robot inverse kinematics under the joint constraints and prioritize the compliance for the disturbance on the object over that on the robot arm. Second, we estimate the disturbance forces throughout the momentum observer with the F/T sensors and adopt admittance control to realize the compliances. Finally, we perform the verify experiments on a 14-DOF position-controlled dual-arm robot WalkerX, clamping a rigid object stably while realizing the compliance against the disturbances.
abstract_zh: 当双臂机器人在人类环境中夹持刚性物体时，环境或协作人类会对被操作物体或机器人手臂施加附带干扰，导致夹持失败，损坏机器人甚至伤害人类。本研究提出了一种优先分层柔顺控制，以同时处理双臂机器人夹紧中的两种类型的干扰。首先，我们使用分层二次规划（HQP）来求解关节约束下的机器人逆运动学，并将物体上的扰动的顺应性优先于机器人手臂上的扰动的顺应性。其次，我们用 F/T 传感器估计整个动量观测器的扰动力，并采用导纳控制来实现合规性。最后，我们在14自由度位置控制双臂机器人WalkerX上进行了验证实验，稳定地夹持刚性物体，同时实现了对扰动的柔顺性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种优先级分层顺从控制方法，用于双臂机器人在夹持刚性物体时应对环境和人类干扰，确保夹持稳定。
AI.motivation: 双臂机器人夹持物体时，环境或协作人类可能施加意外干扰，导致夹持失败、机器人损坏或人员受伤，需提升系统鲁棒性。
AI.method: 采用分层二次规划（HQP）解决关节约束下的逆运动学问题，优先保证物体扰动的顺从性；结合动量观测器与力/扭矩传感器估计干扰力，并通过阻抗控制实现顺从。
AI.result: 在14自由度双臂机器人WalkerX上验证，实验表明该方法能在夹持刚性物体时有效应对干扰，实现稳定夹持。
AI.conclusion: 优先级分层顺从控制方法成功解决了双臂机器人夹持过程中环境与人体干扰的协同抑制问题，提升了操作安全性与稳定性。

authors_text: Junying Chen,Dongfang Li,Qingcai Chen,Wenxiu Zhou,Xin Liu
title: Diaformer: Automatic Diagnosis via Symptoms Sequence Generation
title_zh: Diaformer：通过症状序列生成进行自动诊断
comment: AAAI 2022; The first two authors contributed equally to this paper
comments: AAAI 2022; The first two authors contributed equally to this paper
abstract: Automatic diagnosis has attracted increasing attention but remains challenging due to multi-step reasoning. Recent works usually address it by reinforcement learning methods. However, these methods show low efficiency and require taskspecific reward functions. Considering the conversation between doctor and patient allows doctors to probe for symptoms and make diagnoses, the diagnosis process can be naturally seen as the generation of a sequence including symptoms and diagnoses. Inspired by this, we reformulate automatic diagnosis as a symptoms Sequence Generation (SG) task and propose a simple but effective automatic Diagnosis model based on Transformer (Diaformer). We firstly design the symptom attention framework to learn the generation of symptom inquiry and the disease diagnosis. To alleviate the discrepancy between sequential generation and disorder of implicit symptoms, we further design three orderless training mechanisms. Experiments on three public datasets show that our model outperforms baselines on disease diagnosis by 1%, 6% and 11.5% with the highest training efficiency. Detailed analysis on symptom inquiry prediction demonstrates that the potential of applying symptoms sequence generation for automatic diagnosis.
summary: Automatic diagnosis has attracted increasing attention but remains challenging due to multi-step reasoning. Recent works usually address it by reinforcement learning methods. However, these methods show low efficiency and require taskspecific reward functions. Considering the conversation between doctor and patient allows doctors to probe for symptoms and make diagnoses, the diagnosis process can be naturally seen as the generation of a sequence including symptoms and diagnoses. Inspired by this, we reformulate automatic diagnosis as a symptoms Sequence Generation (SG) task and propose a simple but effective automatic Diagnosis model based on Transformer (Diaformer). We firstly design the symptom attention framework to learn the generation of symptom inquiry and the disease diagnosis. To alleviate the discrepancy between sequential generation and disorder of implicit symptoms, we further design three orderless training mechanisms. Experiments on three public datasets show that our model outperforms baselines on disease diagnosis by 1%, 6% and 11.5% with the highest training efficiency. Detailed analysis on symptom inquiry prediction demonstrates that the potential of applying symptoms sequence generation for automatic diagnosis.
abstract_zh: 自动诊断已引起越来越多的关注，但由于多步骤推理仍然具有挑战性。最近的工作通常通过强化学习方法来解决这个问题。然而，这些方法效率低下，并且需要特定于任务的奖励函数。考虑到医生与患者之间的对话让医生能够探查症状并做出诊断，因此诊断过程自然可以被视为包括症状和诊断的序列的生成。受此启发，我们将自动诊断重新表述为症状序列生成（SG）任务，并提出了一种基于 Transformer（Diaformer）的简单但有效的自动诊断模型。我们首先设计症状关注框架来学习症状查询的生成和疾病诊断。为了缓解顺序生成之间的差异和隐式症状的无序性，我们进一步设计了三种无序训练机制。在三个公共数据集上的实验表明，我们的模型在疾病诊断方面比基线分别提高了 1%、6% 和 11.5%，且训练效率最高。对症状查询预测的详细分析表明，应用症状序列生成进行自动诊断的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Diaformer模型，将自动诊断任务重构为症状序列生成任务，利用Transformer架构实现高效诊断。
AI.motivation: 现有基于强化学习的自动诊断方法效率低且依赖特定奖励函数，而医生与患者对话的自然症状探究过程启发将诊断视为序列生成问题。
AI.method: 设计症状注意力框架学习症状询问与疾病诊断，并引入三种无序训练机制缓解序列生成与隐式症状无序性的差异。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上，疾病诊断准确率分别提升1%、6%和11.5%，且训练效率最高；症状询问预测分析验证了方法潜力。
AI.conclusion: Diaformer通过症状序列生成建模有效解决自动诊断难题，在准确率和效率上均优于现有方法。

authors_text: Dongfang Li,Baotian Hu,Qingcai Chen,Tujie Xu,Jingcong Tao,Yunan Zhang
title: Unifying Model Explainability and Robustness for Joint Text Classification and Rationale Extraction
title_zh: 统一联合文本分类和基本原理提取的模型可解释性和鲁棒性
abstract: Recent works have shown explainability and robustness are two crucial ingredients of trustworthy and reliable text classification. However, previous works usually address one of two aspects: i) how to extract accurate rationales for explainability while being beneficial to prediction; ii) how to make the predictive model robust to different types of adversarial attacks. Intuitively, a model that produces helpful explanations should be more robust against adversarial attacks, because we cannot trust the model that outputs explanations but changes its prediction under small perturbations. To this end, we propose a joint classification and rationale extraction model named AT-BMC. It includes two key mechanisms: mixed Adversarial Training (AT) is designed to use various perturbations in discrete and embedding space to improve the model's robustness, and Boundary Match Constraint (BMC) helps to locate rationales more precisely with the guidance of boundary information. Performances on benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed AT-BMC outperforms baselines on both classification and rationale extraction by a large margin. Robustness analysis shows that the proposed AT-BMC decreases the attack success rate effectively by up to 69%. The empirical results indicate that there are connections between robust models and better explanations.
summary: Recent works have shown explainability and robustness are two crucial ingredients of trustworthy and reliable text classification. However, previous works usually address one of two aspects: i) how to extract accurate rationales for explainability while being beneficial to prediction; ii) how to make the predictive model robust to different types of adversarial attacks. Intuitively, a model that produces helpful explanations should be more robust against adversarial attacks, because we cannot trust the model that outputs explanations but changes its prediction under small perturbations. To this end, we propose a joint classification and rationale extraction model named AT-BMC. It includes two key mechanisms: mixed Adversarial Training (AT) is designed to use various perturbations in discrete and embedding space to improve the model's robustness, and Boundary Match Constraint (BMC) helps to locate rationales more precisely with the guidance of boundary information. Performances on benchmark datasets demonstrate that the proposed AT-BMC outperforms baselines on both classification and rationale extraction by a large margin. Robustness analysis shows that the proposed AT-BMC decreases the attack success rate effectively by up to 69%. The empirical results indicate that there are connections between robust models and better explanations.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，可解释性和鲁棒性是值得信赖和可靠的文本分类的两个关键要素。然而，以前的工作通常涉及两个方面之一：i）如何提取准确的解释性理由，同时有利于预测； ii）如何使预测模型对不同类型的对抗性攻击具有鲁棒性。直观上，产生有用解释的模型应该更能抵御对抗性攻击，因为我们不能信任输出解释但在小扰动下改变其预测的模型。为此，我们提出了一种名为 AT-BMC 的联合分类和基本原理提取模型。它包括两个关键机制：混合对抗训练（AT）旨在利用离散和嵌入空间中的各种扰动来提高模型的鲁棒性，而边界匹配约束（BMC）有助于在边界信息的指导下更精确地定位原理。基准数据集上的性能表明，所提出的 AT-BMC 在分类和基本原理提取方面都远远优于基线。鲁棒性分析表明，所提出的 AT-BMC 有效降低了攻击成功率高达 69%。实证结果表明，稳健的模型和更好的解释之间存在联系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种联合文本分类与理由提取的模型AT-BMC，旨在统一模型的可解释性与鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究通常单独处理模型的可解释性或鲁棒性，而实际中可解释性强的模型应更鲁棒，反之亦然，需统一两者以提升可靠性。
AI.method: 设计混合对抗训练（AT）机制，通过离散空间和嵌入空间的扰动增强鲁棒性；引入边界匹配约束（BMC），利用边界信息精确定位理由。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上分类和理由提取任务均显著优于基线模型，对抗攻击成功率降低达69%。
AI.conclusion: 鲁棒模型与高质量解释存在内在关联，联合优化可解释性与鲁棒性能有效提升模型可靠性。

title: UFPMP-Det: Toward Accurate and Efficient Object Detection on Drone Imagery
title_zh: UFPMP-Det：实现无人机图像上准确、高效的目标检测
abstract: This paper proposes a novel approach to object detection on drone imagery, namely Multi-Proxy Detection Network with Unified Foreground Packing (UFPMP-Det). To deal with the numerous instances of very small scales, different from the common solution that divides the high-resolution input image into quite a number of chips with low foreground ratios to perform detection on them each, the Unified Foreground Packing (UFP) module is designed, where the sub-regions given by a coarse detector are initially merged through clustering to suppress background and the resulting ones are subsequently packed into a mosaic for a single inference, thus significantly reducing overall time cost. Furthermore, to address the more serious confusion between inter-class similarities and intra-class variations of instances, which deteriorates detection performance but is rarely discussed, the Multi-Proxy Detection Network (MP-Det) is presented to model object distributions in a fine-grained manner by employing multiple proxy learning, and the proxies are enforced to be diverse by minimizing a Bag-of-Instance-Words (BoIW) guided optimal transport loss. By such means, UFPMP-Det largely promotes both the detection accuracy and efficiency. Extensive experiments are carried out on the widely used VisDrone and UAVDT datasets, and UFPMP-Det reports new state-of-the-art scores at a much higher speed, highlighting its advantages.
summary: This paper proposes a novel approach to object detection on drone imagery, namely Multi-Proxy Detection Network with Unified Foreground Packing (UFPMP-Det). To deal with the numerous instances of very small scales, different from the common solution that divides the high-resolution input image into quite a number of chips with low foreground ratios to perform detection on them each, the Unified Foreground Packing (UFP) module is designed, where the sub-regions given by a coarse detector are initially merged through clustering to suppress background and the resulting ones are subsequently packed into a mosaic for a single inference, thus significantly reducing overall time cost. Furthermore, to address the more serious confusion between inter-class similarities and intra-class variations of instances, which deteriorates detection performance but is rarely discussed, the Multi-Proxy Detection Network (MP-Det) is presented to model object distributions in a fine-grained manner by employing multiple proxy learning, and the proxies are enforced to be diverse by minimizing a Bag-of-Instance-Words (BoIW) guided optimal transport loss. By such means, UFPMP-Det largely promotes both the detection accuracy and efficiency. Extensive experiments are carried out on the widely used VisDrone and UAVDT datasets, and UFPMP-Det reports new state-of-the-art scores at a much higher speed, highlighting its advantages.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种无人机图像目标检测的新方法，即具有统一前景封装的多代理检测网络（UFPMP-Det）。为了处理大量非常小尺度的实例，不同于常见的将高分辨率输入图像划分为相当多的低前景比例的芯片来对它们分别进行检测的解决方案，设计了统一前景打包（UFP）模块，其中首先通过聚类合并粗检测器给出的子区域以抑制背景，然后将所得子区域打包成马赛克以进行单次推理，从而显着降低总体时间成本。此外，为了解决实例的类间相似性和类内变化之间更严重的混淆（这会降低检测性能但很少被讨论），提出了多代理检测网络（MP-Det），通过采用多个代理学习以细粒度的方式对对象分布进行建模，并通过最小化实例词袋（BoIW）引导的最佳传输损失来强制代理多样化。通过这种方式，UFPMP-Det极大地提高了检测精度和效率。在广泛使用的 VisDrone 和 UAVDT 数据集上进行了大量的实验，UFPMP-Det 以更高的速度报告了新的最先进的分数，凸显了其优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为UFPMP-Det的新方法，旨在提高无人机图像中的目标检测精度和效率。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在处理无人机图像中大量微小目标时存在效率低、背景干扰大以及类别间混淆严重的问题，亟需一种兼顾检测精度与计算效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计了统一前景打包模块（UFP）通过聚类合并子区域并打包为马赛克图像以减少计算量，同时提出多代理检测网络（MP-Det）利用多代理学习和Bag-of-Instance-Words引导的最优运输损失函数，以建模细粒度目标分布并增强类别区分性。
AI.result: 在VisDrone和UAVDT数据集上实验表明，UFPMP-Det在保持高检测精度的同时显著提升了推理速度，达到当前最优性能。
AI.conclusion: UFPMP-Det通过创新的前景打包策略和多代理学习机制，有效解决了无人机图像目标检测中的小目标处理与类别混淆难题，为高效检测提供了新思路。

title: Evaluation and Comparison of Deep Learning Methods for Pavement Crack Identification with Visual Images
title_zh: 视觉图像识别路面裂缝深度学习方法的评价与比较
comment: This work will be submitted for possible publication. It is a further study from 2012.14704v2
comments: This work will be submitted for possible publication. It is a further study from 2012.14704v2
abstract: Compared with contact detection techniques, pavement crack identification with visual images via deep learning algorithms has the advantages of not being limited by the material of object to be detected, fast speed and low cost. The fundamental frameworks and typical model architectures of transfer learning (TL), encoder-decoder (ED), generative adversarial networks (GAN), and their common modules were first reviewed, and then the evolution of convolutional neural network (CNN) backbone models and GAN models were summarized. The crack classification, segmentation performance, and effect were tested on the SDNET2018 and CFD public data sets. In the aspect of patch sample classification, the fine-tuned TL models can be equivalent to or even slightly better than the ED models in accuracy, and the predicting time is faster; In the aspect of accurate crack location, both ED and GAN algorithms can achieve pixel-level segmentation and is expected to be detected in real time on low computing power platform. Furthermore, a weakly supervised learning framework of combined TL-SSGAN and its performance enhancement measures are proposed, which can maintain comparable crack identification performance with that of the supervised learning, while greatly reducing the number of labeled samples required.
summary: Compared with contact detection techniques, pavement crack identification with visual images via deep learning algorithms has the advantages of not being limited by the material of object to be detected, fast speed and low cost. The fundamental frameworks and typical model architectures of transfer learning (TL), encoder-decoder (ED), generative adversarial networks (GAN), and their common modules were first reviewed, and then the evolution of convolutional neural network (CNN) backbone models and GAN models were summarized. The crack classification, segmentation performance, and effect were tested on the SDNET2018 and CFD public data sets. In the aspect of patch sample classification, the fine-tuned TL models can be equivalent to or even slightly better than the ED models in accuracy, and the predicting time is faster; In the aspect of accurate crack location, both ED and GAN algorithms can achieve pixel-level segmentation and is expected to be detected in real time on low computing power platform. Furthermore, a weakly supervised learning framework of combined TL-SSGAN and its performance enhancement measures are proposed, which can maintain comparable crack identification performance with that of the supervised learning, while greatly reducing the number of labeled samples required.
abstract_zh: 与接触式检测技术相比，通过深度学习算法利用视觉图像识别路面裂缝具有不受待检测物体材质限制、速度快、成本低等优点。首先回顾了迁移学习（TL）、编码器-解码器（ED）、生成对抗网络（GAN）的基本框架和典型模型架构及其通用模块，然后总结了卷积神经网络（CNN）骨干模型和GAN模型的演变。在SDNET2018和CFD公共数据集上测试了裂纹分类、分割性能和效果。在斑块样本分类方面，经过微调的TL模型的准确率可以与ED模型相当甚至略好，并且预测时间更快；在裂纹精确定位方面，ED和GAN算法都可以实现像素级分割，有望在低算力平台上进行实时检测。此外，提出了组合TL-SSGAN的弱监督学习框架及其性能增强措施，该框架可以保持与监督学习相当的裂纹识别性能，同时大大减少所需的标记样本数量。

AI.tldr: 本文评估和比较了用于路面裂缝识别的深度学习方法，基于视觉图像进行分析。
AI.motivation: 与接触式检测技术相比，基于视觉图像的深度学习方法在材料限制、速度和成本方面具有优势，但需进一步优化模型效率和减少标注数据需求。
AI.method: 综述了迁移学习（TL）、编码-解码器（ED）、生成对抗网络（GAN）等框架，总结了CNN和GAN模型的演变，并在SDNET2018和CFD数据集上测试分类与分割性能，提出结合TL-SSGAN的弱监督学习框架。
AI.result: 微调TL模型在分类准确率上可媲美或优于ED模型且预测更快；ED和GAN算法可实现像素级分割，适合低算力平台实时检测；弱监督框架在减少标注样本数量的同时保持与监督学习相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: TL、ED和GAN在路面裂缝检测中各有优势，弱监督框架有效降低了标注数据依赖，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

search_text: Evaluation and Comparison of Deep Learning Methods for Pavement Crack Identification with Visual Images 视觉图像识别路面裂缝深度学习方法的评价与比较 Compared with contact detection techniques, pavement crack identification with visual images via deep learning algorithms has the advantages of not being limited by the material of object to be detected, fast speed and low cost. The fundamental frameworks and typical model architectures of transfer learning (TL), encoder-decoder (ED), generative adversarial networks (GAN), and their common modules were first reviewed, and then the evolution of convolutional neural network (CNN) backbone models and GAN models were summarized. The crack classification, segmentation performance, and effect were tested on the SDNET2018 and CFD public data sets. In the aspect of patch sample classification, the fine-tuned TL models can be equivalent to or even slightly better than the ED models in accuracy, and the predicting time is faster; In the aspect of accurate crack location, both ED and GAN algorithms can achieve pixel-level segmentation and is expected to be detected in real time on low computing power platform. Furthermore, a weakly supervised learning framework of combined TL-SSGAN and its performance enhancement measures are proposed, which can maintain comparable crack identification performance with that of the supervised learning, while greatly reducing the number of labeled samples required. 与接触式检测技术相比，通过深度学习算法利用视觉图像识别路面裂缝具有不受待检测物体材质限制、速度快、成本低等优点。首先回顾了迁移学习（TL）、编码器-解码器（ED）、生成对抗网络（GAN）的基本框架和典型模型架构及其通用模块，然后总结了卷积神经网络（CNN）骨干模型和GAN模型的演变。在SDNET2018和CFD公共数据集上测试了裂纹分类、分割性能和效果。在斑块样本分类方面，经过微调的TL模型的准确率可以与ED模型相当甚至略好，并且预测时间更快；在裂纹精确定位方面，ED和GAN算法都可以实现像素级分割，有望在低算力平台上进行实时检测。此外，提出了组合TL-SSGAN的弱监督学习框架及其性能增强措施，该框架可以保持与监督学习相当的裂纹识别性能，同时大大减少所需的标记样本数量。 本文评估和比较了用于路面裂缝识别的深度学习方法，基于视觉图像进行分析。 Kai-Liang Lu cs.CV,cs.AI

title: Multimodal Adversarially Learned Inference with Factorized Discriminators
title_zh: 具有因式分解判别器的多模态对抗学习推理
abstract: Learning from multimodal data is an important research topic in machine learning, which has the potential to obtain better representations. In this work, we propose a novel approach to generative modeling of multimodal data based on generative adversarial networks. To learn a coherent multimodal generative model, we show that it is necessary to align different encoder distributions with the joint decoder distribution simultaneously. To this end, we construct a specific form of the discriminator to enable our model to utilize data efficiently, which can be trained constrastively. By taking advantage of contrastive learning through factorizing the discriminator, we train our model on unimodal data. We have conducted experiments on the benchmark datasets, whose promising results show that our proposed approach outperforms the-state-of-the-art methods on a variety of metrics. The source code will be made publicly available.
summary: Learning from multimodal data is an important research topic in machine learning, which has the potential to obtain better representations. In this work, we propose a novel approach to generative modeling of multimodal data based on generative adversarial networks. To learn a coherent multimodal generative model, we show that it is necessary to align different encoder distributions with the joint decoder distribution simultaneously. To this end, we construct a specific form of the discriminator to enable our model to utilize data efficiently, which can be trained constrastively. By taking advantage of contrastive learning through factorizing the discriminator, we train our model on unimodal data. We have conducted experiments on the benchmark datasets, whose promising results show that our proposed approach outperforms the-state-of-the-art methods on a variety of metrics. The source code will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 从多模态数据中学习是机器学习中的一个重要研究课题，它有可能获得更好的表示。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种基于生成对抗网络的多模态数据生成建模的新方法。为了学习连贯的多模态生成模型，我们证明有必要同时将不同的编码器分布与联合解码器分布对齐。为此，我们构建了一种特定形式的判别器，使我们的模型能够有效地利用数据，并可以进行对比训练。通过分解鉴别器来利用对比学习，我们在单峰数据上训练我们的模型。我们对基准数据集进行了实验，其令人鼓舞的结果表明，我们提出的方法在各种指标上都优于最先进的方法。源代码将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络的多模态生成模型，通过分解判别器实现高效的数据利用和分布对齐。
AI.motivation: 多模态数据学习能获得更优表示，但现有方法在分布对齐和数据利用效率上存在不足，需设计新框架提升性能。
AI.method: 构建特定形式的分解判别器，通过对比学习机制在单模态数据上训练模型，同时对齐编码器与解码器分布。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，该方法在多项指标上优于现有最优方法，且代码将公开。
AI.conclusion: 分解判别器与对比学习结合有效提升多模态生成建模性能，为相关应用提供新思路。

title: Lane Departure Prediction Based on Closed-Loop Vehicle Dynamics
title_zh: 基于闭环车辆动力学的车道偏离预测
abstract: An automated driving system should have the ability to supervise its own performance and to request human driver to take over when necessary. In the lane keeping scenario, the prediction of vehicle future trajectory is the key to realize safe and trustworthy driving automation. Previous studies on vehicle trajectory prediction mainly fall into two categories, i.e. physics-based and manoeuvre-based methods. Using a physics-based methodology, this paper proposes a lane departure prediction algorithm based on closed-loop vehicle dynamics model. We use extended Kalman filter to estimate the current vehicle states based on sensing module outputs. Then a Kalman Predictor with actual lane keeping control law is used to predict steering actions and vehicle states in the future. A lane departure assessment module evaluates the probabilistic distribution of vehicle corner positions and decides whether to initiate a human takeover request. The prediction algorithm is capable to describe the stochastic characteristics of future vehicle pose, which is preliminarily proved in simulated tests. Finally, the on-road tests at speeds of 15 to 50 km/h further show that the pro-posed method can accurately predict vehicle future trajectory. It may work as a promising solution to lane departure risk assessment for automated lane keeping functions.
summary: An automated driving system should have the ability to supervise its own performance and to request human driver to take over when necessary. In the lane keeping scenario, the prediction of vehicle future trajectory is the key to realize safe and trustworthy driving automation. Previous studies on vehicle trajectory prediction mainly fall into two categories, i.e. physics-based and manoeuvre-based methods. Using a physics-based methodology, this paper proposes a lane departure prediction algorithm based on closed-loop vehicle dynamics model. We use extended Kalman filter to estimate the current vehicle states based on sensing module outputs. Then a Kalman Predictor with actual lane keeping control law is used to predict steering actions and vehicle states in the future. A lane departure assessment module evaluates the probabilistic distribution of vehicle corner positions and decides whether to initiate a human takeover request. The prediction algorithm is capable to describe the stochastic characteristics of future vehicle pose, which is preliminarily proved in simulated tests. Finally, the on-road tests at speeds of 15 to 50 km/h further show that the pro-posed method can accurately predict vehicle future trajectory. It may work as a promising solution to lane departure risk assessment for automated lane keeping functions.
abstract_zh: 自动驾驶系统应该具有监督自身性能并在必要时请求人类驾驶员接管的能力。在车道保持场景中，车辆未来轨迹的预测是实现安全可信驾驶自动化的关键。以往关于车辆轨迹预测的研究主要分为两类，即基于物理的方法和基于机动的方法。本文采用基于物理的方法，提出了一种基于闭环车辆动力学模型的车道偏离预测算法。我们使用扩展卡尔曼滤波器根据传感模块输出来估计当前车辆状态。然后，使用具有实际车道保持控制律的卡尔曼预测器来预测未来的转向动作和车辆状态。车道偏离评估模块评估车辆拐角位置的概率分布，并决定是否发起人工接管请求。该预测算法能够描述未来车辆位姿的随机特征，并在模拟测试中得到初步证明。最后，15至50 km/h速度下的道路测试进一步表明，该方法可以准确预测车辆未来的轨迹。它可能是自动车道保持功能的车道偏离风险评估的一种有前景的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于闭环车辆动力学模型的车道偏离预测算法，用于自动驾驶系统中的轨迹预测与风险评估。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需要准确预测车辆轨迹以确保安全，传统方法存在局限性，需改进预测精度以实现可靠的人机协同控制。
AI.method: 结合扩展卡尔曼滤波估计车辆状态，利用卡尔曼预测器与实际车道保持控制律预测未来轨迹，并通过概率分布评估车道偏离风险。
AI.result: 仿真与实车测试（15-50km/h）表明该算法能有效描述车辆姿态的随机特性，准确预测轨迹并触发接管请求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为自动驾驶车道保持功能提供了可行的车道偏离风险评估方案，具有应用前景。

method: 结合扩展卡尔曼滤波估计车辆状态，利用卡尔曼预测器与实际车道保持控制律预测未来轨迹，并通过概率分布评估车道偏离风险。
result: 仿真与实车测试（15-50km/h）表明该算法能有效描述车辆姿态的随机特性，准确预测轨迹并触发接管请求。
conclusion: 该方法为自动驾驶车道保持功能提供了可行的车道偏离风险评估方案，具有应用前景。
search_text: Lane Departure Prediction Based on Closed-Loop Vehicle Dynamics 基于闭环车辆动力学的车道偏离预测 An automated driving system should have the ability to supervise its own performance and to request human driver to take over when necessary. In the lane keeping scenario, the prediction of vehicle future trajectory is the key to realize safe and trustworthy driving automation. Previous studies on vehicle trajectory prediction mainly fall into two categories, i.e. physics-based and manoeuvre-based methods. Using a physics-based methodology, this paper proposes a lane departure prediction algorithm based on closed-loop vehicle dynamics model. We use extended Kalman filter to estimate the current vehicle states based on sensing module outputs. Then a Kalman Predictor with actual lane keeping control law is used to predict steering actions and vehicle states in the future. A lane departure assessment module evaluates the probabilistic distribution of vehicle corner positions and decides whether to initiate a human takeover request. The prediction algorithm is capable to describe the stochastic characteristics of future vehicle pose, which is preliminarily proved in simulated tests. Finally, the on-road tests at speeds of 15 to 50 km/h further show that the pro-posed method can accurately predict vehicle future trajectory. It may work as a promising solution to lane departure risk assessment for automated lane keeping functions. 自动驾驶系统应该具有监督自身性能并在必要时请求人类驾驶员接管的能力。在车道保持场景中，车辆未来轨迹的预测是实现安全可信驾驶自动化的关键。以往关于车辆轨迹预测的研究主要分为两类，即基于物理的方法和基于机动的方法。本文采用基于物理的方法，提出了一种基于闭环车辆动力学模型的车道偏离预测算法。我们使用扩展卡尔曼滤波器根据传感模块输出来估计当前车辆状态。然后，使用具有实际车道保持控制律的卡尔曼预测器来预测未来的转向动作和车辆状态。车道偏离评估模块评估车辆拐角位置的概率分布，并决定是否发起人工接管请求。该预测算法能够描述未来车辆位姿的随机特征，并在模拟测试中得到初步证明。最后，15至50 km/h速度下的道路测试进一步表明，该方法可以准确预测车辆未来的轨迹。它可能是自动车道保持功能的车道偏离风险评估的一种有前景的解决方案。 本文提出了一种基于闭环车辆动力学模型的车道偏离预测算法，用于自动驾驶系统中的轨迹预测与风险评估。 Daofei Li,Siyuan Lin,Guanming Liu cs.RO,eess.SY

title: String Sampling with Bidirectional String Anchors
title_zh: 使用双向字符串锚点进行字符串采样
comment: Extended version of an ESA 2021 paper; it includes proofs omitted from the conference version and new results obtained by Michelle Sweering
comments: Extended version of an ESA 2021 paper; it includes proofs omitted from the conference version and new results obtained by Michelle Sweering
abstract: The minimizers sampling mechanism is a popular mechanism for string sampling introduced independently by Schleimer et al. [SIGMOD 2003] and by Roberts et al. [Bioinf. 2004]. Given two positive integers $w$ and $k$, it selects the lexicographically smallest length-$k$ substring in every fragment of $w$ consecutive length-$k$ substrings (in every sliding window of length $w + k - 1$). Minimizers samples are approximately uniform, locally consistent, and computable in linear time. Two main disadvantages of minimizers sampling mechanisms are: first, they do not have good guarantees on the expected size of their samples for every combination of $w$ and $k$; and, second, indexes that are constructed over their samples do not have good worst-case guarantees for on-line pattern searches. We introduce bidirectional string anchors (bd-anchors), a new string sampling mechanism. Given a positive integer $\ell$, our mechanism selects the lexicographically smallest rotation in every length-$\ell$ fragment (in every sliding window of length $\ell$). We show that bd-anchors samples are also approximately uniform, locally consistent, and computable in linear time. In addition, our experiments using several datasets demonstrate that the bd-anchors sample sizes decrease proportionally to $\ell$; and that these sizes are competitive to or smaller than the minimizers sample sizes using the analogous sampling parameters. We provide theoretical justification for these results by analyzing the expected size of bd-anchors samples. As a negative result, we show that computing a total order $\leq$ on the input alphabet, which minimizes the bd-anchors sample size, is NP-hard. We also show that by using any bd-anchors sample, we can construct, in near-linear time, an index which requires linear (extra) space in the size of the sample and answers on-line pattern searches in near-optimal time.
summary: The minimizers sampling mechanism is a popular mechanism for string sampling introduced independently by Schleimer et al. [SIGMOD 2003] and by Roberts et al. [Bioinf. 2004]. Given two positive integers $w$ and $k$, it selects the lexicographically smallest length-$k$ substring in every fragment of $w$ consecutive length-$k$ substrings (in every sliding window of length $w + k - 1$). Minimizers samples are approximately uniform, locally consistent, and computable in linear time. Two main disadvantages of minimizers sampling mechanisms are: first, they do not have good guarantees on the expected size of their samples for every combination of $w$ and $k$; and, second, indexes that are constructed over their samples do not have good worst-case guarantees for on-line pattern searches. We introduce bidirectional string anchors (bd-anchors), a new string sampling mechanism. Given a positive integer $\ell$, our mechanism selects the lexicographically smallest rotation in every length-$\ell$ fragment (in every sliding window of length $\ell$). We show that bd-anchors samples are also approximately uniform, locally consistent, and computable in linear time. In addition, our experiments using several datasets demonstrate that the bd-anchors sample sizes decrease proportionally to $\ell$; and that these sizes are competitive to or smaller than the minimizers sample sizes using the analogous sampling parameters. We provide theoretical justification for these results by analyzing the expected size of bd-anchors samples. As a negative result, we show that computing a total order $\leq$ on the input alphabet, which minimizes the bd-anchors sample size, is NP-hard. We also show that by using any bd-anchors sample, we can construct, in near-linear time, an index which requires linear (extra) space in the size of the sample and answers on-line pattern searches in near-optimal time.
abstract_zh: 最小化采样机制是 Schleimer 等人独立引入的一种流行的字符串采样机制。 [SIGMOD 2003] 和 Roberts 等人。 [生物信息。 2004]。给定两个正整数 $w$ 和 $k$，它会在 $w$ 连续的 length-$k$ 子串的每个片段中选择按字典顺序最小的 length-$k$ 子串（在长度为 $w + k - 1$ 的每个滑动窗口中）。最小化器样本近似均匀、局部一致并且可在线性时间内计算。最小化采样机制的两个主要缺点是：首先，它们不能很好地保证 $w$ 和 $k$ 的每种组合的样本预期大小；其次，基于样本构建的索引对于在线模式搜索没有良好的最坏情况保证。我们引入了双向字符串锚点（bd-anchors），一种新的字符串采样机制。给定一个正整数 $\ell$，我们的机制会在每个长度 $\ell$ 片段中（在每个长度为 $\ell$ 的滑动窗口中）选择字典顺序最小的旋转。我们证明 bd-anchors 样本也是近似均匀的、局部一致的并且可以在线性时间内计算。此外，我们使用多个数据集的实验表明，bd-anchors 样本大小按比例减少到 $\ell$；并且这些大小与使用类似采样参数的最小化样本大小相比具有竞争力或更小。我们通过分析 bd-anchors 样本的预期大小为这些结果提供了理论依据。作为否定结果，我们表明计算输入字母表上的总顺序 $\leq$ 是 NP 困难的，这会最小化 bd-anchors 样本大小。我们还表明，通过使用任何 bd-anchors 样本，我们可以在接近线性的时间内构建一个索引，该索引需要样本大小的线性（额外）空间，并在接近最佳的时间内回答在线模式搜索。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为双向字符串锚点（bd-anchors）的新字符串采样机制，旨在改进传统最小化采样方法的局限性。
AI.motivation: 传统最小化采样方法在样本大小的理论保证和索引构建的最坏情况性能方面存在不足，需设计更优的采样机制。
AI.method: 通过滑动窗口在长度为ℓ的片段中选择字典序最小的旋转作为锚点，并分析样本大小的期望值。
AI.result: 实验表明bd-anchors样本量随ℓ线性减少且优于最小化方法；同时证明确定最优字母序以最小化样本量是NP难问题。
AI.conclusion: bd-anchors在保持线性时间复杂度的同时提供了更优的样本特性，但其最优字母序求解存在计算复杂性限制。
